synopsis.canonical: The game is set in the world of Japanese high school baseball, centered around the prestigious summer Kōshien tournament. Players guide their high school baseball team through regional qualifiers and toward the ultimate goal of competing in the national championship at Hanshin Kōshien Stadium.

Similar to its predecessor, the game focuses on Japanese high school baseball culture and the dream of reaching Kōshien Stadium. The narrative revolves around teenage athletes pursuing their baseball aspirations while balancing school life and team dynamics.

The story takes place in "The World R:2", a new version of the MMORPG following the events of the original .hack series. Players follow Haseo, a Player Killer hunter seeking revenge against Tri-Edge, a mysterious player who put his friend Shino into a coma. The game explores themes of identity, revenge, and the blurred lines between virtual and real consequences.

Continuing Haseo's story, this volume delves deeper into the mysteries of The World R:2 and the AIDA phenomenon. Haseo begins to uncover the truth about Tri-Edge while dealing with his growing powers as an Epitaph User. The narrative explores themes of memory, loss, and the nature of existence within virtual worlds.

The final volume of the G.U. trilogy sees Haseo confronting the ultimate threat to The World R:2 as AIDA corruption reaches critical levels. The story culminates in revelations about the true nature of The World and the sacrifice required to save both the virtual realm and its players. Themes of redemption, sacrifice, and the value of virtual relationships reach their climax.

Set in "The World", the most popular MMORPG, the story follows Kite who receives a mysterious book from his friend Orca that contains a virus. When Orca falls into a coma after encountering a monster that shouldn't exist, Kite gains the power to "Data Drain" and begins investigating the corruption spreading through The World. The game explores the dangerous intersection of virtual gaming and real-world consequences.

The second part of Kite's journey continues as more players fall victim to the mysterious phenomena in The World. Morganna, the AI that controls the game's systems, becomes increasingly hostile as Kite and his friends get closer to awakening Aura, a special AI that could threaten Morganna's existence. The story deepens the mystery of Harald Hoerwick, The World's creator, and his tragic past.

As the third chapter unfolds, The World begins experiencing massive system failures and widespread player comas as Morganna's desperation grows. Kite and his allies discover more about Aura's true nature as the Ultimate AI and Harald's original vision for The World. The boundary between the virtual world and reality becomes increasingly blurred as the crisis intensifies.

The final chapter sees The World on the brink of total collapse as Morganna makes her last desperate attempt to prevent Aura's birth. Kite must gather all his allies for a final assault on the deepest levels of The World to awaken Aura and restore stability. The story concludes the tale of Harald's vision and the birth of true AI consciousness within the virtual realm.

.hack//frägment is set in "The World," a fictional MMORPG where players connect through VR-like interfaces. The game explores the mysterious events and data anomalies that occur within this virtual world, continuing the themes of the .hack series about the blurred lines between reality and virtual existence.

Set in the James Bond universe, the game follows various missions and scenarios from Bond films and original storylines. Players take on the role of the legendary secret agent 007, using high-tech vehicles and gadgets to complete espionage missions.

An original Bond story featuring the secret agent investigating the mysterious industrialist Raphael Drake and his connection to stolen nuclear weapons. The plot involves international espionage, high-tech villains, and Bond's mission to prevent a nuclear catastrophe.

Based on the James Bond films Casino Royale and Quantum of Solace, the game follows Bond's pursuit of the shadowy Quantum organization. The story involves betrayal, revenge, and Bond's quest to uncover a global conspiracy while dealing with personal loss.

Based on the James Bond film, the game follows agent 007 as he pursues the shadowy organization Quantum across the globe. Bond must uncover the conspiracy behind Quantum while dealing with betrayal and revenge in the world of international espionage.

Based on the James Bond film of the same name, the game follows Bond's mission to protect oil heiress Elektra King and stop the terrorist Renard. The story involves nuclear threats, personal betrayal, and Bond's investigation into a complex revenge plot spanning multiple countries.

Based on the James Bond film, the game follows Bond's mission to protect oil heiress Elektra King from the terrorist Renard. The story involves nuclear threats, betrayal, and a complex revenge plot that spans multiple international locations.

Based on the television game show format where contestants face off against a mob of 100 people in trivia challenges. The setting recreates the high-stakes quiz show environment with virtual audiences and prize competitions.
A straightforward bowling simulation set in realistic bowling alleys. The game focuses purely on the sport of bowling without any narrative elements or story context.

Set in a world where gun violence has escalated to extreme levels, the story follows characters caught in deadly conflicts involving organized crime and corruption. The narrative explores themes of revenge and survival in an urban warfare setting.
A basic American football simulation without narrative context, focusing purely on the sport itself. The game represents standard football gameplay with teams competing on regulation fields.

Set in the world of American football, players advance through different skill levels from high school to professional leagues. The game represents the journey of a football team climbing through increasingly difficult competitions to reach the top.

A collection of classic games and puzzles without overarching narrative, representing traditional tabletop and card games in digital format. The compilation focuses on timeless gameplay experiences rather than storytelling.

The game is set in a quiz show universe where contestants compete for monetary prizes up to one million yen. Players take on the role of quiz contestants attempting to climb the prize ladder through their knowledge and quick thinking.

Based on the classic French card game, players compete in a cross-country automobile race. The game simulates a road trip where players must reach exactly 1000 kilometers while dealing with hazards and obstacles along the way.

Set in Disney's Dalmatians universe, the story follows Patch, one of the 101 dalmatian puppies, as he gets separated from his family during their move to the countryside. Patch must navigate through London to reunite with his family while meeting his television hero Thunderbolt along the way.
A collection of mini-games presented without an overarching narrative universe. The game serves as a compilation of simple arcade-style challenges and puzzles.
A sports-themed mini-game collection without a specific story or universe. The game presents various athletic competitions and sporting activities in a party game format.

The game takes place in various mountain resorts where professional snowboarders compete in different events and freestyle competitions. Players participate in tournaments and training sessions across multiple snowy locations. The focus is purely on snowboarding culture and competition without any overarching narrative.
A collection of traditional family board games and card games presented in digital format. The game recreates classic household gaming experiences without an overarching narrative.

The story follows psychic investigators dealing with supernatural phenomena and criminal cases involving paranormal abilities. The narrative explores themes of psychic powers, criminal investigation, and the intersection between science and the supernatural. Players uncover mysteries that blur the line between psychological thriller and science fiction.

An educational game featuring a collection of classic fairy tales and stories. The game was designed as part of the Lightspan educational gaming system to help children with reading and comprehension.
A digital adaptation of the traditional Chinese tile-matching game Mahjong. The game follows the classic rules and traditions of the ancient tile game without additional narrative elements.

Players take on the role of professional truck drivers competing in cross-country delivery challenges across America. The game focuses on the trucking industry and the competitive world of freight transportation, where drivers must prove their skills on the open road.

Set in the underground street racing scene, the game follows drivers involved in illegal racing circuits mixed with criminal activities. Players navigate a world of high-stakes racing where loyalty and survival are key themes.

Set aboard the infamous RMS Titanic during its maiden voyage, players must solve a mystery before the ship meets its tragic fate. The game takes place in the days leading up to the disaster, incorporating historical elements of the voyage.

Set during World War II's Pacific Theater, specifically during the Battle of Midway and surrounding naval conflicts. Players control Allied fighter pilots battling against Japanese forces in historically-inspired aerial combat scenarios.

Set during World War II's Pacific Theater, specifically during the Battle of Midway in 1943. Players take control of Allied fighter planes fighting against the Japanese Imperial Navy in historically-inspired aerial combat scenarios.

Set in the world of arcade-style ice hockey, featuring over-the-top, fast-paced hockey action without traditional rules or penalties. The game emphasizes pure competitive hockey gameplay in a more casual, accessible format.

Based on the official 2002 FIFA World Cup held in Japan and South Korea, featuring authentic teams, players, and venues from the tournament. The game recreates the atmosphere and competition of the real-world championship event.

The game recreates the official 2002 FIFA World Cup tournament held in Japan and South Korea. Players can experience the complete tournament structure from group stages through the final match. The game features authentic teams, stadiums, and the atmosphere of the actual World Cup event.

Based on the official 2006 FIFA World Cup held in Germany, featuring authentic teams, players, and venues from the tournament. The game captures the excitement and national pride of the world's premier football championship.

The game recreates the official 2006 FIFA World Cup tournament held in Germany. Players can experience the journey from qualification rounds through the final tournament, featuring all licensed teams and stadiums from the actual event.

The game represents the official 2006 FIFA World Cup tournament held in Germany. Players can participate in the complete World Cup experience from qualification rounds to the final tournament. The narrative follows real-world national teams competing for football's ultimate prize.

The game recreates the official 2010 FIFA World Cup tournament held in South Africa. Players can participate in the complete World Cup experience, from qualification campaigns through the final tournament across South African venues.

Set in the year 2020, the game features a futuristic version of baseball where cybernetic enhancements and advanced technology have transformed the sport. Teams compete in a high-tech league with robotic players and enhanced human athletes.

Set in a futuristic world where baseball has evolved into a high-tech sport with cybernetic enhancements and advanced equipment. The game takes place in various futuristic stadiums across different planets and space colonies. Teams compete in this enhanced version of America's pastime with supernatural abilities and technological augmentations.

Based on the TV series, the game takes place between seasons 2 and 3 of the show. Jack Bauer and CTU must prevent terrorist attacks while dealing with government conspiracies and personal betrayals in Los Angeles.

Set in an urban environment plagued by crime and corruption, the game follows the stories of both police officers and gang members. The narrative explores the blurred lines between law enforcement and criminal activity in a morally ambiguous city.

Set in the world of extreme sports competition, athletes compete in dangerous races across various terrain types. The game focuses on high-speed racing with combat elements as riders battle for supremacy in underground racing circuits.

Various mecha anime series converge in an alternate timeline where Earth faces multiple alien invasions and interdimensional threats. Pilots from different universes must unite their giant robots to defend humanity against overwhelming odds.

The game combines multiple mecha anime series into a single universe where various robot pilots must unite against common threats. Different anime franchises coexist as their heroes battle against alien invaders and other mechanical menaces. The story weaves together characters and plotlines from series like Gundam, Mazinger Z, and Getter Robo.

The Super Robot Wars universe brings together various mecha anime series into a single timeline where Earth faces threats from alien invaders and interdimensional forces. Players command a united force of iconic robots and their pilots from different anime franchises to defend humanity. The story involves crossover narratives between series like Gundam, Mazinger Z, and Getter Robo.

Set in the Alpha timeline, the story continues the battle against the Aerogaters and introduces new threats including the Shadow-Mirror from a parallel dimension. The Earth Federation faces multiple alien invasions while dealing with internal conflicts and the consequences of previous wars. Various mecha anime universes converge as humanity struggles for survival against overwhelming odds.

Based on the movie of the same name, the game follows three young ninja brothers who must travel to Japan to compete in a martial arts tournament. Their grandfather needs them to retrieve a valuable dagger and prove their ninja skills against various opponents. The story involves family honor, ancient traditions, and the boys' journey to become true ninja warriors.

Based on the movie of the same name, three young ninja brothers must travel to Japan to compete in a martial arts tournament and save their grandfather. The story follows the trio as they face various enemies and challenges while mastering their ninja skills.

The game is set in a fantastical amusement park where players navigate through various themed attractions and rides. Each pinball table represents a different area of the park with its own unique challenges and secrets to discover. The park serves as a backdrop for exciting pinball action with carnival and thrill ride themes.

Set in a futuristic world where players navigate through various virtual reality environments and digital landscapes. The game presents a cyberpunk-inspired universe filled with technological mysteries and puzzles.

The game presents traditional American baseball in various stadium settings without a specific narrative universe. Players participate in standard baseball seasons and games following official MLB rules and structure. The focus is on realistic baseball simulation rather than story elements.

A realistic baseball simulation that recreates the atmosphere and excitement of professional baseball. The game focuses on authentic gameplay mechanics and team management rather than narrative storytelling.

The classic Lemmings universe is transported into three-dimensional space, where the mindless green-haired creatures continue their suicidal march toward danger. Players must guide these oblivious creatures through complex 3D environments filled with traps and obstacles.

The Lemmings universe features small green-haired creatures who mindlessly march forward into dangerous situations without regard for their safety. Players must guide these creatures through increasingly complex three-dimensional obstacle courses to safety.
A straightforward billiards simulation without a narrative universe or story context. The game focuses purely on recreating the sport of pool in a portable format.

Set in the world of extreme sports competition, athletes compete in dangerous street races and stunts across urban environments. The game focuses on underground racing culture and extreme sports lifestyle.

Multiple mecha anime universes converge as interdimensional threats require heroes from different series to unite. Giant robots and their pilots from various anime franchises must work together to save their combined realities from destruction.

A crossover universe where various mecha anime series collide, featuring giant robots and their pilots fighting against alien invasions and interdimensional threats. The story combines storylines from multiple anime franchises including Gundam, Mazinger Z, and Getter Robo into one cohesive narrative.

items.title: 3rd Super Robot Wars Alpha: To the End of the Galaxy

synopsis.canonical: The final chapter of the Alpha series sees the ultimate convergence of mecha anime universes as cosmic-level threats endanger all existence. Heroes must venture beyond their home dimensions to face enemies that threaten the very fabric of space and time.

Based on the manga series, the story follows the world of Sanjiyan and immortal beings in modern Japan mixed with ancient mysticism. Demons and supernatural creatures exist alongside humans in a world where ancient powers still hold sway.

Based on the manga series, the story follows the world of Sanjiyan and immortal beings in modern Japan mixed with ancient mysticism. Demons and supernatural creatures exist alongside humans in a world where ancient powers still hold sway.

Based on the manga series, the story follows the world of Sanjiyan and immortal beings in modern Japan mixed with ancient mysticism. Demons and supernatural creatures exist alongside humans in a world where ancient powers still hold sway.

Based on the manga series, the game follows the story of Pai, a triclops (sanjiyan) seeking to become human, and Yakumo, her immortal Wu protector. The world blends modern settings with ancient mystical powers and demons from Chinese mythology.

Set in the 3×3 Eyes universe, this game adaptation follows the supernatural adventures of Pai and Yakumo as they encounter various demons and mystical threats. The story incorporates elements from the early manga chapters dealing with ancient curses and demonic possession.

The world has been thrown into chaos as the four classical elements - earth, air, fire, and water - have been disrupted by dark magic. The player must restore balance to the world by solving puzzles related to each elemental realm and defeating the evil forces that have corrupted them.
A collection of classic puzzle and board games presented in a simple digital format. The package contains traditional games without any overarching narrative or story elements.
A realistic soccer simulation focused on authentic team tactics and formations. The game emphasizes strategic gameplay over narrative elements, recreating professional football matches.

Brother and sister Ruff and Tumble must rescue the stolen dreams of children from the evil Nitekap and his army of nightmare creatures called Hoodwinks. The dream world has been corrupted, turning peaceful dreams into terrifying nightmares that threaten to spill into the real world.

The game follows two children, Ruff and Tumble, who must enter the dream world to rescue stolen winks (sleep spirits) from the evil Nitekap. Nitekap has captured these magical creatures to prevent children from sleeping peacefully. The adventure takes place across various dream-themed worlds filled with nightmarish creatures and surreal landscapes.

Various mecha anime series converge in an alternate timeline where Earth faces invasion from alien forces and interdimensional threats. Heroes from different robot anime universes must unite their forces to defend humanity against overwhelming odds, with original characters bridging the crossover narrative.

Set in a post-apocalyptic world where off-road racing has become the primary form of competition and survival. Drivers compete in dangerous terrain across various wastelands and ruined landscapes, with racing serving as both entertainment and a means of establishing territory and resources.

The game is set in a world where off-road racing has evolved into a high-stakes competitive sport across diverse and challenging natural environments. Racers compete for money and reputation while navigating treacherous terrain that tests both driving skill and vehicle engineering.

The game follows rapper 50 Cent as he seeks revenge against those who betrayed him and left him for dead. Set in a gritty urban environment, the story involves drug deals gone wrong, corrupt cops, and gang warfare. 50 Cent must fight his way through various enemies to uncover the truth behind the conspiracy against him.

A traditional Japanese card game adaptation featuring anime-style characters and storylines. The game incorporates elements of romance and friendship through its narrative framework. Players engage with various characters through the traditional Hanafuda card game format.

items.title: 64 Trump Collection: Alice no Waku Waku Trump World

synopsis.canonical: Set in a whimsical world inspired by Alice in Wonderland, the game features various card games in a fantastical setting. Alice explores different areas of this magical realm, each offering different card-based challenges. The adventure combines the classic Alice narrative with traditional playing card games.

Set in the traditional world of Japanese sumo wrestling, the game recreates the authentic atmosphere of professional sumo tournaments. Players participate in the ancient sport with its rich traditions and ceremonial aspects. The game focuses on the honor and discipline inherent in sumo culture.

A continuation of the traditional sumo wrestling experience, featuring expanded tournament modes and additional wrestlers. The game maintains the authentic atmosphere of professional sumo with enhanced presentation and more detailed ceremonies. Players can experience the full journey from novice to grand champion.

Set during the Cold War era, the game simulates modern submarine warfare in various global hotspots. Players command a nuclear submarine tasked with completing dangerous missions behind enemy lines. The scenarios involve realistic naval combat situations and strategic submarine operations.

Set in feudal Japan, the story follows a ronin warrior seeking to master seven different legendary sword fighting styles. The protagonist travels across ancient Japan, facing various opponents and challenges to perfect each blade technique. The journey involves honor, revenge, and the pursuit of ultimate swordsmanship.

Set in modern-day New York, the game follows a young man trying to climb the social ladder through manipulation and seduction. The story revolves around the seven deadly sins as gameplay mechanics, encouraging morally questionable behavior to achieve success. Players navigate relationships and social situations while embracing various sinful behaviors.

The game is set in ancient times where players work to construct the legendary Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. Each wonder represents a different civilization and era, from the Hanging Gardens of Babylon to the Lighthouse of Alexandria. The narrative follows the historical and mythological significance of these architectural marvels.

The game follows an archaeological adventure through history's most magnificent ancient structures. Players take on the role of explorers uncovering the mysteries behind the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. Each wonder presents its own historical setting and challenges tied to the civilization that built it.

Set in a retro-futuristic world inspired by 1970s mecha anime, players control giant robots in battles reminiscent of classic super robot shows. The game pays homage to the golden age of Japanese robot animation with its stylized presentation and over-the-top action sequences.

Set in a urban skateboarding environment, the player must perform tricks and complete objectives while avoiding the 'skate or die' countdown. The game world consists of various skateparks and street locations where different challenges await. Failure to maintain momentum and skills results in being pursued by killer bees.

The world of Eden faces destruction from massive dragons that have appeared and begun terraforming the land with deadly flowers called Dragon Bloom. Humanity's survival depends on special warriors who can resist the toxic pollen and fight back against the dragon threat. The story follows multiple parties of adventurers working to save their world from complete annihilation.

The game is set in the world of competitive pool/billiards where players compete in tournaments and matches. The narrative focuses on climbing the ranks in the pool hall circuit and facing increasingly skilled opponents. Various venues and tournament settings provide the backdrop for the billiards competitions.
A soccer simulation set in European football leagues, focusing on tournament play and championship matches. The game captures the atmosphere of European football culture during the mid-1990s.

items.title: 999: Nine Hours, Nine Persons, Nine Doors

summary.legacy: Neuf personnes piégées dans un jeu de mort — le meilleur visual novel sur DS avec des fins multiples.
summary.canonical: Neuf personnes piégées dans un jeu de mort — le meilleur visual novel sur DS avec des fins multiples.

synopsis.canonical: Nine strangers wake up trapped aboard a sinking ship and are forced to participate in the deadly Nonary Game by a mysterious figure called Zero. Each participant has a numbered bracelet and must solve puzzles while navigating through numbered doors to escape before the ship sinks in nine hours. The game explores themes of memory, identity, and the consequences of past experiments involving psychic abilities.

Based on the Pixar film, the game follows the story of Flik, an inventive ant who must help save his colony from the oppressive grasshopper gang led by Hopper. The ant colony lives under the threat of the grasshoppers who demand food tribute each season. Flik embarks on a journey to find warrior bugs to help defend his home, but discovers he must rely on his own ingenuity and courage.

Following the same Pixar film storyline, this Game Boy Color version tells the story of Flik's quest to save Ant Island from Hopper's grasshopper gang. The game adapts key moments from the movie where Flik must prove that even the smallest bug can make the biggest difference. The narrative follows Flik's journey from outcast inventor to unlikely hero.

Based on the Disney-Pixar film, the game follows Flik, an inventive ant who must find warrior bugs to help defend his colony from the oppressive grasshoppers led by Hopper. The story takes place in a miniature world where ants live in fear of the annual grasshopper tribute. Flik's journey leads him to discover that the circus bugs he recruits aren't actually warriors, but together they must still save Ant Island.

Based on the Disney-Pixar film, the game follows Flik, an inventive ant who must find warrior bugs to help defend his colony from the oppressive grasshoppers led by Hopper. The story takes place in a miniature world where ants live in fear of the annual grasshopper tribute. Flik's journey leads him to discover that the circus bugs he recruits aren't actually warriors, but together they must still save Ant Island.

Based on the animated film 'We're Back! A Dinosaur's Story,' the game follows friendly dinosaurs who have been brought to modern New York City to grant children's wishes. The dinosaurs, led by Rex, must navigate the human world while being pursued by the villainous Professor Screweyes. Their mission is to make children happy while avoiding capture and returning safely to their own time.

Part of the A-Train series, the game is set in a world where players take on the role of a railroad company president tasked with developing transportation networks. The goal is to build a thriving economic empire through strategic railway construction and urban development. The game focuses on the relationship between transportation infrastructure and economic growth in developing regions.

Based on Ray Bradbury's classic science fiction short story, the game is set in a future where time travel hunting expeditions allow people to hunt dinosaurs in the prehistoric past. When someone steps off the designated path during a hunting trip, they alter the timeline and create catastrophic changes in the present. The protagonist must travel through different time periods to repair the timeline and restore the original history.

The story follows Liddell, a student witch who accidentally gets trapped in a magical storybook world filled with twisted fairy tale characters. She must navigate through various fairy tale lands that have been corrupted by dark magic, meeting both helpful and hostile versions of classic storybook characters. To escape and return to her world, Liddell must master her magical abilities and restore the stories to their proper form.

items.title: A-Ressha de Ikou Z: Mezase! Tairiku Oudan

synopsis.canonical: Another entry in the A-Train series, this game challenges players to build a transcontinental railroad network across vast territories. The setting involves developing railway infrastructure to connect distant cities and regions, promoting economic growth and territorial expansion. Players must overcome geographical challenges and economic constraints to achieve the ultimate goal of continental railway dominance.

The A-Train series takes place in a realistic modern setting where players take on the role of a transportation company executive. The goal is to develop profitable railway networks while managing urban development and economic growth in various Japanese cities.

Set in a modern urban environment, players assume the role of a railway company president tasked with building efficient transportation systems. The game focuses on the relationship between public transportation and urban development in a realistic economic simulation.

The game presents a contemporary setting where players manage a transportation company responsible for connecting cities through efficient rail networks. The focus is on balancing profitability with public service in a realistic economic framework.

Set in modern Japan, players control a railway corporation with the objective of creating profitable transportation networks while fostering urban growth. The game emphasizes the economic and social impact of efficient public transportation systems.

The game takes place in a realistic modern setting where players manage a railway company with the goal of creating efficient transportation networks. The narrative focuses on the challenges of balancing commercial success with public transportation needs.

Set during a fictional modern conflict, players command an elite air strike unit tasked with completing dangerous missions behind enemy lines. The story follows military operations in hostile territory where air superiority is crucial for mission success.

Set in a futuristic world where humanity faces an alien invasion, players control advanced mecha units in defense of Earth. The story follows the desperate battle against extraterrestrial forces using cutting-edge robotic technology.

The game recreates the authentic NFL experience with official teams and players from the late 1980s season. Set within the real-world context of professional American football, it captures the excitement and competition of Monday Night Football broadcasts.

Set in a whimsical world centered around the Australian Football League, players enter a colorful universe where AFL team mascots live together and engage in various activities. The game creates a family-friendly environment celebrating AFL culture through its beloved mascot characters.

The game recreates the official 2005 Australian Football League season with authentic teams, players, and venues. Set within the real-world context of professional Australian Rules Football, it captures the intensity and tradition of AFL competition.

Set in the Australian Football League universe, players compete in the 2006 AFL season with official teams and stadiums. The game recreates the atmosphere and structure of professional Australian Rules Football competition.

Based on the 2007 Australian Football League season, featuring all official teams, players, and venues from that year. The game captures the competitive spirit of Australia's premier football competition.
A traditional Japanese chess simulation without narrative elements, focusing purely on the ancient strategic board game. The game presents shogi in its classical form with various difficulty levels.
The third installment in the AI Shogi series, continuing the tradition of pure shogi gameplay without story elements. It focuses on providing an authentic Japanese chess experience with improved AI.
Set in AMF bowling centers, players participate in various bowling tournaments and challenges. The game recreates the atmosphere of competitive and casual bowling in official AMF venues.

Taking place in AMF bowling alleys, the game features both traditional and extreme bowling variations with power-ups and special effects. Players compete in tournaments across various AMF locations with enhanced, arcade-style gameplay.

Set in the underground streetball scene, players rise through the ranks of street basketball culture associated with the AND 1 brand. The game captures the raw, competitive atmosphere of urban basketball courts and the quest for street credibility.

Set in a cyberpunk future where reality and virtual worlds blur, players follow Ann Flores as she searches for her missing brother in a corrupt metropolis. The world combines 2D and 3D perspectives in a dystopian setting filled with corporate conspiracy and technological enhancement.

Set in a world where ancient magic and modern technology coexist, players follow a group of heroes investigating mysterious supernatural phenomena. The story involves ancient seals being broken and dark forces threatening the balance between the magical and technological worlds.

Based on the official ATP Tour tennis circuit, players compete in professional tennis tournaments around the world. The game recreates the atmosphere and structure of real professional tennis competition.

The game presents a straightforward racing universe focused on all-terrain vehicle competition across various outdoor environments. Players compete in ATV races across different terrains and weather conditions to become the ultimate off-road champion.

The game takes place in various outdoor environments where ATV racing and freestyle competitions are held across different terrains. Players participate in professional ATV circuits and events to become the ultimate off-road champion.

Continuing the off-road racing scene, players compete in expanded ATV championships across more diverse and challenging terrain environments. The game expands the competitive racing circuit with new locations and enhanced freestyle competitions.

The third installment continues the ATV racing championship series with expanded venues and more extreme off-road environments. Players compete in professional ATV circuits while exploring new racing disciplines and freestyle events.

The final entry in the series features the most comprehensive ATV racing championship experience with expanded career modes and diverse racing environments. Players compete to become the ultimate ATV champion across various disciplines and terrains.
Players compete in professional ATV racing circuits across various outdoor environments and tracks. The game focuses on competitive quad racing with different classes and championship events.

The game takes place in a world of competitive all-terrain vehicle racing across various outdoor environments. Riders compete in championship circuits featuring different terrains and weather conditions. The focus is on realistic ATV racing simulation with authentic vehicle physics.

The sequel expands the ATV racing championship with more diverse tracks and enhanced competitive racing circuits. Players compete across various terrain types in professional quad racing events and championships.
Players participate in fast-paced ATV racing competitions across various outdoor tracks and environments. The game focuses on arcade-style quad racing with emphasis on speed and competitive racing.

Set in the world of professional sumo wrestling, players follow the career of aspiring wrestlers trying to rise through the ranks. The game focuses on traditional Japanese sumo culture and the rigorous training required to become a yokozuna (grand champion).

Based on a manga series, the game follows the world of sumo wrestling with comedic elements and exaggerated characters. The story revolves around sumo tournaments and the various colorful wrestlers who compete in them.

Based on the Oh My Goddess anime/manga series, the game follows college student Keiichi Morisato who accidentally calls the Goddess Relief Office and summons the goddess Belldandy. The story explores their relationship and encounters with other supernatural beings in modern Japan.

A baseball-themed game that follows players through various stages of a baseball career in Japan. The narrative focuses on the dedication and perseverance required to succeed in professional baseball.

The game is set in the underground monster world beneath New York City, where young monsters attend a scare school to learn how to properly frighten humans. The story follows monster students as they complete various frightening assignments given by their teachers. The monsters must prove themselves worthy by successfully scaring humans on the surface world.

Based on the Nickelodeon animated series, the game is set in a monster academy beneath a city dump where young monsters learn the art of scaring humans. The story follows monster students as they complete their frightening assignments in the human world above.

The peaceful planet Abadox has been consumed by a massive alien parasite called Parasitis, which has grown to planetary size and threatens all life. A lone space marine named Nazal must venture inside the living planet to rescue Princess Maria, who was swallowed during the initial attack. The hero must navigate through the organic interior of this monstrous entity to save both the princess and what remains of civilization.

The game follows a rebellious princess who must reclaim her kingdom from various threats and political intrigue. Set in a fantasy realm where royal duty conflicts with personal desires, the princess embarks on adventures that test both her combat skills and leadership abilities.
Set in modern military combat scenarios, players command M1 Abrams tanks in various battlefield situations. The game focuses on realistic tank warfare and strategic combat operations.

Set in a futuristic world where high-speed racing has evolved into anti-gravity combat sport. Pilots compete in dangerous tournaments using advanced hovering vehicles equipped with weapons. The story follows racers fighting for supremacy in this deadly competition.

Miles Edgeworth continues his work as a prosecutor, investigating crimes and seeking the truth behind complex cases. The story involves a conspiracy surrounding the prosecutorial system and features cases that test Edgeworth's dedication to justice. Multiple interconnected mysteries unfold as Edgeworth confronts corruption within the legal system.

Miles Edgeworth takes center stage as a prosecutor who investigates crimes personally rather than waiting for police reports. The story follows Edgeworth as he uncovers a smuggling ring conspiracy that threatens international relations. Multiple cases interweave to reveal a larger criminal organization operating across borders.

Set on the fictional continent of Usea, the game depicts the Continental War between the Independent State Allied Forces and the rebel nation of Erusea. The story is told through the perspective of a young boy living in occupied territory and follows the legendary pilot 'Mobius 1' who becomes a symbol of hope. The narrative explores themes of war, heroism, and the impact of conflict on civilians.

Set in the Strangereal universe on the Usean continent, the story follows a rebellion by the Usean Rebel Forces against the legitimate government. The player takes the role of Phoenix, a pilot fighting for the Allied Forces to restore peace to the region. The conflict involves advanced military technology and strategic aerial warfare across various theaters.

Set in 2040 in the Strangereal universe, the story depicts a corporate war between megacorporations General Resource and Neucom Inc. The conflict involves advanced technology including AI-controlled aircraft and virtual reality systems. The narrative explores themes of corporate control, artificial intelligence, and the nature of human consciousness in a cyberpunk setting.

Set in the Real World rather than Strangereal, the story follows the United Task Force's campaign against a terrorist organization. The narrative focuses on a pilot's mission to stop global terrorist activities across various real-world locations. The conflict involves international cooperation to combat the terrorist threat.

Based on the BBC television series, the story follows superhero Ace Lightning who is transported from a video game into the real world. Ace must battle his arch-nemesis Lord Fear and other villains who have also escaped into reality. The narrative combines superhero action with the concept of fictional characters becoming real.

Based on the tennis manga and anime series, the game follows the story of Hiromi Oka, a high school student who joins her school's tennis club. The narrative focuses on her journey to become a skilled tennis player while dealing with rivalry, friendship, and personal growth in the competitive world of high school tennis.

Set in the world of Looney Tunes cartoons, players enter a creative studio environment where they can produce their own animated sequences. The game presents itself as a digital animation workshop featuring classic Warner Bros. characters and settings.

The story follows a group of plane crash survivors stranded on Mount Aconcagua in the Andes Mountains during a severe blizzard. Players must navigate the harsh mountain environment while uncovering the mysterious circumstances behind the crash and dealing with supernatural elements that begin to emerge.

Set in a futuristic world where acrobatic pilots control advanced aircraft in aerial combat missions. The story involves defending Earth from an alien invasion using highly maneuverable fighter craft capable of performing impossible aerial stunts.

Players take the role of a deity known as 'The Master' who has awakened from a long slumber to find the world overrun by evil creatures led by the demon Tanzra. The god must reclaim six lands, rebuild civilizations, and restore balance to the world through both direct action and divine guidance.

The Master returns to face a new threat as Tanzra has been resurrected and seeks revenge against the deity. This time, the demon lord has become more powerful and has corrupted the world once again, forcing The Master into direct combat without the city-building aspects of divine guidance.

The game presents realistic bass fishing scenarios across various American lakes and waterways. Players take on the role of an aspiring professional angler working their way up through fishing tournaments and competitions.

Based on the Action Man toy line and animated series, the story follows the elite soldier Action Man as he battles against the evil organization led by Dr. X. The mission involves stopping Dr. X's latest scheme to achieve world domination through advanced technology and destructive weapons.

Based on the Action Man toy line and animated series, the game follows the elite soldier Action Man as he battles the evil organization led by Dr. X. Action Man must use his extreme sports skills and military training to stop various villainous plots and save the world from destruction.

Set in the Action Man universe, the game features Action Man facing off against an army of robots threatening global security. The story involves infiltrating enemy bases and dismantling robotic forces using stealth and combat skills.

items.title: Action Man: Search for Base X

synopsis.canonical: Action Man must locate and infiltrate the mysterious Base X, headquarters of Dr. X's criminal operations. The mission involves gathering intelligence and stopping Dr. X's latest scheme for world conquest.

The game takes place in the colorful world of pachinko parlors where players engage in the popular Japanese gambling game. The narrative revolves around achieving success and mastery in various pachinko machines.

A puzzle game set in a minimalist abstract world where colored orbs move along predetermined paths. The player must prevent these orbs from reaching their destination by strategically matching colors and creating chain reactions.
A realistic golf simulation featuring professional golf courses and tournaments. The game aims to recreate the authentic experience of professional golf without a specific narrative storyline.

The game presents realistic golf tournaments on professionally designed courses without a specific narrative storyline. Players compete in various golf championships and tournaments to climb the professional rankings.

The sequel continues the realistic golf simulation experience with expanded course selection and improved tournament modes. Like its predecessor, it focuses on authentic golf gameplay rather than story elements.

The third installment in the Actua Golf series maintains the focus on realistic golf simulation with updated graphics and expanded features. The game continues to prioritize authentic golf experiences over narrative content.
A realistic ice hockey simulation that recreates professional hockey leagues and tournaments. The game focuses on authentic hockey action and team management without a specific storyline.

There is no overarching narrative or story mode in Actua Pool, as it is a realistic pool simulation game. The game focuses purely on recreating authentic pool hall experiences with various game modes.
The game recreates the atmosphere of professional pool halls and tournaments without a central narrative. Players engage in various pool game variants in realistic environments.
Actua Soccer has no story mode or fictional universe, being a realistic football simulation. The game aims to recreate authentic football matches with real-world teams and players.
The game features real football teams and players competing in authentic stadiums and tournaments. It focuses on recreating the atmosphere and excitement of professional football matches.
Actua Tennis contains no narrative elements or fictional storyline, focusing instead on realistic tennis simulation. The game recreates professional tennis tournaments and matches.

Based on the 1993 film, the game follows the eccentric Addams family as they face new supernatural threats and family drama. The story involves protecting the family estate and dealing with various macabre situations that the family finds delightful.

Based on the 1993 film, the game follows the eccentric Addams family as they deal with their new nanny Debbie Jellinsky who has sinister plans. The story involves rescuing family members and uncovering Debbie's plot to murder Fester for his fortune.

Set in a colorful fantasy world, young Adiboo must help solve the mystery surrounding his friend Paziral's secret. The adventure takes place in Adiboo's magical garden environment where learning and exploration go hand in hand.

Adibou's peaceful world is threatened by a mysterious green shadow that brings darkness and problems to his magical garden. The young hero must investigate this supernatural threat and restore harmony to his colorful realm.
Adidas Power Soccer features no story elements, focusing purely on arcade-style football gameplay. The game emphasizes fast-paced soccer action with the Adidas brand prominently featured throughout.
A sports simulation game featuring international soccer teams and tournaments. The game focuses on realistic soccer matches with official Adidas branding and equipment.

The game is set in the world of professional racing where drivers compete in various championship circuits. Players take on the role of an aspiring racer looking to climb the ranks and become champion.

The game takes place in a fictional world where four nations engage in tactical warfare using modern military units. The Orange Star army faces off against enemy forces in a series of strategic battles across various terrains.

The Black Hole Army, led by Sturm, launches a massive invasion across multiple continents to conquer the world. The four nations must unite their forces to repel this dark army that threatens global destruction.

A catastrophic meteor strike has devastated civilization, leaving survivors to fight over scarce resources in a post-apocalyptic wasteland. Military forces struggle to maintain order while new threats emerge from the chaos.
The Black Hole Army returns under new leadership, launching another campaign of conquest across the world. Two COs can now fight together on massive battlefields that span both screens of the DS.

The Variable Geo tournament brings together female martial artists from around the world to compete for the title. Each fighter has their own personal motivations and fighting style as they battle through the competition.

Master Higgins must rescue his girlfriend Tina from the evil Witch Doctor who has kidnapped her and taken her to Adventure Island. The island is filled with dangerous creatures and obstacles that Higgins must overcome to save his beloved.

Master Higgins must rescue his girlfriend Tina from the evil Witch Doctor who has kidnapped her and taken her to his island fortress. The tropical Adventure Island is filled with dangerous creatures and obstacles that stand between Higgins and his beloved.

Master Higgins must rescue his girlfriend Tina from the evil Witch Doctor who has kidnapped her and taken her to Adventure Island. The tropical island is filled with dangerous creatures and obstacles that Master Higgins must overcome to save his beloved.

Master Higgins and Tina are enjoying their honeymoon when aliens suddenly invade Adventure Island and kidnap Tina along with the island's children. Higgins must once again venture across the island to defeat the alien menace and rescue his wife and the kidnapped children.

Master Higgins must rescue his girlfriend Tina from the evil Witch Doctor who has kidnapped her and taken her to his island fortress. The tropical Adventure Island is filled with dangerous creatures and obstacles that stand between Higgins and his beloved.

Master Higgins returns to face new challenges as he must once again save his friends and loved ones from danger on Adventure Island. The evil forces have returned with greater power, threatening the peaceful island paradise once more.

items.title: Adventure Time: Hey Ice King! Why'd You Steal Our Garbage?!!

synopsis.canonical: Set in the post-apocalyptic Land of Ooo, Finn the Human and Jake the Dog discover that the Ice King has been stealing their garbage for mysterious reasons. The duo embarks on an adventure across familiar Adventure Time locations to confront the Ice King and uncover his peculiar motivations.

Set in the magical world of Tokyo DisneySea theme park, players explore various themed areas inspired by ocean tales and Disney stories. The game captures the wonder and adventure of the real theme park through its virtual recreation.

A young visitor to Disney's Magic Kingdom must help save the day when the six silver keys to the castle gate go missing just before a parade. The player must explore various Disney-themed attractions and lands to recover the keys and ensure the celebration can proceed.

In prehistoric times, the caveman Dino Riki must survive in a dangerous world filled with dinosaurs, hostile creatures, and natural hazards. Armed with primitive weapons, he ventures through various prehistoric environments to overcome the challenges of his ancient world.

summary.canonical: Adventures of Lolo est un jeu Action sorti en 1989 sur Nintendo Entertainment System, développé par HAL Laboratory. Metascore : 78 — Rareté : UNCOMMON.

synopsis.canonical: The peaceful land of Eden is threatened when the Great Devil kidnaps Princess Lala and takes her to his haunted castle. The round blue hero Lolo must venture through the devil's castle, solving puzzles in each room to rescue his beloved princess and restore peace to their kingdom.

In the kingdom of Eden, the evil King Egger has captured Princess Lala and imprisoned her in his haunted castle. The brave blue ball-like hero Lolo must venture through the castle's many puzzle-filled rooms to rescue his beloved princess.

The game takes place in the Great Devil's castle where Princess Lala has been captured and trapped. Lolo must navigate through multiple floors of puzzle rooms to rescue his beloved princess from the evil King Egger.

After their previous adventure, Lolo and Lala are living peacefully when the evil King Egger returns with a new castle full of even more challenging puzzles. Once again, Princess Lala is captured, and Lolo must brave the enhanced dangers of Egger's new stronghold.

The evil King Egger has launched his final assault on the peaceful land, and both Lolo and Lala must work together to stop him. This time, the adventure takes them through multiple worlds as they attempt to defeat King Egger once and for all.

items.title: Adventures of Rocky & Bullwinkle and Friends

synopsis.canonical: Based on the classic cartoon series, the game follows the adventures of Rocky the flying squirrel and Bullwinkle the moose as they face off against their recurring enemies Boris and Natasha. The duo must thwart various schemes hatched by the villainous spies from Pottsylvania.

Set in Jellystone Park, the game follows the famous cartoon bear Yogi and his sidekick Boo-Boo as they engage in their typical antics of trying to steal picnic baskets. Ranger Smith continues his efforts to maintain order in the park while dealing with Yogi's schemes.

Based on the classic Hanna-Barbera cartoon, Yogi Bear and Boo Boo must save Jellystone Park from being shut down. The duo embarks on various adventures through different areas of the park to collect items and solve problems threatening their home.

summary.legacy: Aerial Assault est un jeu Action sorti en 1990 sur Game Gear, développé par Sega. Metascore : 75 — Rareté : UNCOMMON.
summary.canonical: Aerial Assault est un jeu Action sorti en 1990 sur Game Gear, développé par Sega. Metascore : 75 — Rareté : UNCOMMON.

synopsis.canonical: Set in a futuristic world where Earth is under attack by alien forces, players take control of advanced fighter aircraft to repel the invasion. The fate of humanity rests on the success of these aerial combat missions against the extraterrestrial threat.

In the year 2011, a mad scientist threatens world peace with his army of high-tech aircraft and weapons. An international coalition of pilots from various countries must unite to stop this global threat and restore peace to the world.

Earth faces invasion from an alien force that threatens global destruction. International fighter pilots unite to form the Aero Fighters squadron to repel the extraterrestrial threat. The battle takes place across various global locations as humanity's last hope rests with these elite pilots.

Aero is a performing acrobat bat who works at a circus that gets threatened by the evil industrialist Edgar Ektor. Ektor plans to destroy the circus and build an amusement park in its place. Aero must use his acrobatic skills to stop Ektor's scheme and save his circus home.

Aero is a circus acrobat bat who discovers that the evil industrialist Edgar Ektor plans to destroy the world's amusement parks and circuses. Using his acrobatic skills and aerial abilities, Aero must stop Ektor's sinister plot to preserve entertainment venues worldwide.

Aero is a star performer in a traveling circus who must save his fellow performers from the evil industrialist Edgar Ektor. The story follows Aero's acrobatic adventures through various circus-themed and industrial environments. His mission is to stop Ektor's plans to destroy the circus and harm his friends.

Edgar Ektor returns with a new evil plan after his previous defeat, this time targeting Aero more directly. Aero must once again use his acrobatic abilities to thwart Ektor's schemes and protect his friends. The adventure takes Aero through various dangerous environments as he pursues his nemesis.

Following his previous victory, Aero faces a new threat when Edgar Ektor returns with even more diabolical plans. The evil industrialist has escaped and continues his campaign against entertainment venues, forcing Aero back into action to stop him once again.

Set in a futuristic world where high-speed hovering vehicles compete in dangerous racing circuits. The sport of AeroGauge racing has become the ultimate test of pilot skill and machine performance. Racers compete across various challenging courses using advanced anti-gravity technology.

Set in the competitive world of commercial aviation, players take control of an airline company starting from the 1960s. The goal is to build a successful international airline empire while competing against rival companies. The game spans several decades of aviation history and global economic changes.

Set in the competitive world of commercial aviation, players take control of an airline company starting in 1955. The game spans several decades as players build their airline empire, competing against rival companies in a realistic business simulation of the aviation industry.

Set in the competitive world of commercial aviation, players take control of an airline company starting in 1955. The game spans several decades of aviation history, challenging players to build their airline empire through strategic business decisions. The narrative focuses on the evolution of air travel and the business challenges faced by airline companies during the golden age of aviation.

Set in a realistic modern aviation industry environment, players take control of an airline company competing in the global market. The game spans multiple decades as players build their aviation empire from the 1960s through the 1990s, dealing with historical events that affect the airline industry.

The sequel to Aerobiz extends the timeline into the future, beginning in 1955 and continuing into the 21st century. Players must navigate the evolving aviation industry including the development of supersonic passenger aircraft and changing global economics affecting air travel.

The game takes place in a futuristic setting where the player pilots an advanced fighter craft through various hostile environments. Enemy forces have taken control of strategic locations and must be eliminated to restore peace.
Set in a post-apocalyptic world where mechanical threats roam the wasteland. The remaining survivors must fight against robotic enemies to reclaim their territory.

Set in present-day Japan, the story follows FBI agent Jonathan Weaver who experiences supernatural visions that allow him to see past events at crime scenes. The narrative centers around solving a complex murder case involving his own past and a mysterious connection to previous investigations.
The game recreates professional tennis tournaments and matches featuring real-world tennis players and venues. Players compete in various tournaments to climb the professional tennis rankings.

Based on Agatha Christie's classic detective novel, the game follows the investigation of a series of murders where the killer leaves ABC railway guides at each crime scene. The story takes place in 1930s England as Detective Hercule Poirot races to catch the serial killer.

Set in the ancient world where mortals interact with gods and mythological creatures, the game features campaigns from Greek, Egyptian, and Norse civilizations. Players command legendary heroes and mythical units while gods grant divine powers to aid in conquest and exploration.

items.title: Age of Empires: The Age of Kings

synopsis.canonical: Set during the medieval period, the game chronicles various historical campaigns including the rise of Joan of Arc, the Mongol conquests, and the Crusades. Players command civilizations through pivotal moments in history, managing both military campaigns and the development of their societies.

Set in a sci-fi future, Agent Armstrong follows a special operative working for a government agency. The agent must infiltrate enemy facilities and complete various covert missions to maintain global security.

The game takes place in various urban environments where inline skating culture thrives. Players participate in competitions and challenges across different cities to build their reputation in the aggressive inline skating scene.

Based on the real Formula 1 racing circuit, the game features authentic F-1 tracks and racing scenarios from the early 1990s season. Players compete in the world of professional Formula 1 racing with realistic physics and track layouts.
A traditional mahjong game set in a modern context where players compete against AI opponents in various mahjong parlors. The game follows standard Japanese mahjong rules and conventions.

items.title: Ai Sensei no Oshiete: Watashi no Hoshi

synopsis.canonical: An educational game where players learn about astronomy and space through interactive lessons with a virtual teacher. The game combines entertainment with educational content about stars, planets, and celestial phenomena.

Set in the fantasy world of Aidyn where magic and ancient powers shape the land's destiny. The story follows heroes on a quest to prevent dark forces from overwhelming the realm, involving ancient prophecies and magical artifacts.

items.title: Aighina no Yogen: From the Legend of Balubalouk

synopsis.canonical: Set in a fantasy world, the game follows the ancient prophecy of Aighina and the legendary tale of Balubalouk. Heroes must embark on a quest to fulfill the prophecy and save their realm from impending darkness.

Based on the popular manga and anime series, the game follows aspiring tennis players at a prestigious tennis academy. The story focuses on young athletes striving to become professional tennis champions through training and competition.

Set in a futuristic world where air boarding has become a popular extreme sport. Competitors race on high-tech hoverboards through various aerial courses and environments, competing for glory in professional air boarding circuits.

In a world threatened by an alien invasion, Earth's last hope lies with advanced fighter aircraft equipped with powerful weapons. The story follows pilots defending the planet against waves of extraterrestrial forces across different landscapes and battles.

Set during modern military conflicts, players take control of helicopter units in various combat scenarios. The game focuses on tactical helicopter warfare and rescue operations in hostile territories.

Air Combat is set in a fictional world where elite pilots engage in aerial warfare across various international conflicts. The game follows military operations involving advanced fighter aircraft in combat scenarios around the globe.

Air Diver takes place in a near-future setting where pilots must defend against enemy forces using advanced combat aircraft. The story involves protecting civilian areas and military installations from aerial threats.

The story follows Hal Bailman, a lone warrior tasked with destroying eight massive Air Fortresses that threaten the galaxy. These fortress ships are heavily armed and pose an existential threat to peaceful civilizations.
A digital recreation of the classic arcade air hockey game with no narrative context. The game simulates the physics and gameplay of table air hockey.
The game recreates the world of competitive air racing with various aircraft and international racing circuits. Pilots compete in high-speed aerial races through challenging courses.

The game simulates the high-pressure environment of air traffic control at busy international airports. Players must manage the safe and efficient flow of aircraft through increasingly complex airspace scenarios.

Set in the world of aviation management, players take on the role of air traffic controllers managing busy airports. The game simulates the high-pressure environment of coordinating aircraft takeoffs, landings, and flight paths.

summary.canonical: Air Zonk est un jeu Action sorti en 1992 sur TurboGrafx-16, développé par Hudson Soft. Metascore : 80 — Rareté : UNCOMMON.

synopsis.canonical: Set in a cyberpunk future where the heroic cyborg Air Zonk must battle against mechanical enemies and alien invaders threatening Earth. The game takes place in various futuristic environments filled with robotic adversaries and technological hazards.

A military aviation conflict where various air forces engage in aerial combat across different theaters of war. Players take on the role of mercenary pilots fighting for different factions in a world torn by international conflicts.

Part of the Airforce Delta series set in a world of aerial combat where mercenary pilots take on various military contracts. The story involves international conflicts resolved through air superiority and tactical missions.

Based on the TV series, the game features the high-tech military helicopter Airwolf and its crew on secret missions. The story involves covert operations and rescue missions using the advanced combat helicopter's capabilities.

Based on a mystery novel by Akagawa Jirō, the story revolves around supernatural occurrences on a ghost train. Players must solve the mystery behind the haunted railway and uncover the truth about the spectral passengers.

Based on the famous manga and anime, the game is set in Neo-Tokyo in 2019 after a catastrophic explosion. The story follows the conflict between motorcycle gangs and government forces amid psychic phenomena and conspiracy. Players navigate through the dystopian city dealing with the aftermath of Akira's awakening.

Akuji is a voodoo priest who was murdered on his wedding day and cast into the underworld. Stripped of his heart by Baron Samedi, he must journey through hell to reclaim it and return to the land of the living. The game explores themes of voodoo mythology and supernatural horror as Akuji seeks revenge.

Based on the manga by Shigeru Mizuki, the story follows a young boy who can summon and control demons to fight evil spirits and supernatural threats. The world is filled with yokai, demons, and supernatural creatures that threaten humanity.

items.title: Al Unser Jr.'s Road to the Top

synopsis.canonical: The game follows the career path of professional racing, allowing players to work their way up through various racing circuits. Players start in lower-tier racing and progress toward elite IndyCar competition. The narrative focuses on the journey of becoming a champion driver like Al Unser Jr.

Set in the world of professional IndyCar racing, the game recreates the high-speed oval and road course racing that Al Unser Jr. was famous for. Players compete in the intense world of open-wheel racing where split-second decisions determine victory. The game captures the excitement and danger of 1980s IndyCar competition.

summary.canonical: Aladdin est un jeu Action sorti en 1993 sur Super Nintendo, développé par Capcom. Metascore : 82 — Rareté : COMMON.

synopsis.canonical: Following Disney's animated film, this version tells the same story of Aladdin discovering the magic lamp in the Cave of Wonders. The street rat must outwit the villainous Jafar and win the heart of Princess Jasmine with the help of the Genie. The game features fluid animation and follows the movie's plot closely.

synopsis.canonical: Set in the world of Disney's Aladdin, the story follows the street thief Aladdin as he discovers a magical lamp and falls in love with Princess Jasmine. The narrative spans from his humble beginnings through his adventures with the Genie and his battle against the evil Jafar.

Set in a fantasy world where humans and various magical races coexist, the story follows a young hero on a quest to save the world from an ancient evil. The narrative involves collecting magical artifacts and uniting different peoples against a common threat. Magic and technology blend together in this epic adventure across diverse kingdoms.

synopsis.canonical: The story takes place in a world where the floating continent of Eldean is threatened by dark forces seeking to plunge it into eternal darkness. Albert, a young swordsman, must gather a party of allies and collect the power of the Elemental Weapons to save his world. The adventure spans across multiple floating islands and magical realms as ancient secrets are revealed.

Set in a fantasy world where magic and technology coexist, the story follows Albert as he embarks on a quest to save the world from an ancient evil. The land of Eldean is threatened by dark forces that seek to plunge the world into eternal darkness.

Set in a fantasy world where the protagonist must retrieve the legendary Alcahest sword to save the land from an ancient evil. The story follows a young warrior on a quest through various mystical realms filled with demons and magical creatures. The world is threatened by dark forces that can only be stopped by the power of the sacred sword.
