summary.canonical: La mascotte originale Sega — Alex Kidd poing-en-poing contre les ennemis de Janken le Grand.

synopsis.canonical: Alex Kidd lives on the planet Aries in the kingdom of Radaxian, which has been taken over by the evil Janken the Great. The young martial artist must rescue the kidnapped King Thunder and restore peace to his homeland. Alex discovers he may be the lost brother of the missing king during his adventure.

items.title: Alex Kidd in the Enchanted Castle

synopsis.canonical: Alex Kidd travels to the planet Paperock to find his long-lost father, King Thor, only to discover the planet is under the control of the evil Ashra. The inhabitants have been turned to stone, and Alex must break the curse to save them. His quest leads him through the mysterious Enchanted Castle where he faces various challenges.

Based on the Alex Rider book and film series, the story follows teenage spy Alex Rider as he investigates the mysterious Stormbreaker computer project. After his uncle's death, Alex is recruited by MI6 to uncover a plot involving the billionaire Darrius Sayle. The mission takes Alex into a world of espionage and danger as he tries to prevent a catastrophic attack on British schools.

Based on Anthony Horowitz's spy novel series, the story follows teenage spy Alex Rider as he infiltrates a technology company to uncover a plot involving the Stormbreaker computers. Alex must use his training and gadgets to stop a villainous scheme that threatens schools across Britain.

The game takes place in a realistic equestrian world where players experience the life of a young horse rider. The story follows Alexandra's continued journey in competitive horseback riding, building relationships with horses and improving riding skills through various challenges and competitions.

Alfred is a chicken who must rescue his girlfriend and fellow chickens from the evil Meka-Chickens who have invaded their peaceful farm. The mechanical invaders have taken over various locations and Alfred must brave dangerous environments to save his friends. The story takes place across multiple worlds filled with hostile robots and traps.

Alfred Chicken is a heroic poultry protagonist who must rescue his fellow chickens from various dangers across different environments. The game takes place in a cartoonish world where Alfred faces off against enemies and obstacles to save his feathered friends.

Alfred Chicken is a heroic poultry character who must rescue his girlfriend and other chickens from the evil Meka-Chickens. The story takes place across various fantastical environments where Alfred must overcome obstacles and enemies to save the day.

Alfred Chicken is a superhero chicken who must save his girlfriend and fellow chickens from the evil Meka-Chickens. The game takes place across various platforming environments where mechanical chickens have taken over and threaten the peaceful chicken community.

Based on Tim Burton's 2010 film adaptation, Alice returns to Wonderland as a young adult to fulfill her destiny as the prophesied slayer of the Jabberwocky. The story follows Alice as she rediscovers the magical realm and fights against the Red Queen's tyrannical rule.

Based on Tim Burton's 2010 film, the game follows Alice as she returns to Wonderland as a young adult to fulfill her destiny. She must help the resistance defeat the Red Queen's tyrannical rule and restore the White Queen to power.

The game features Alice from Alice in Wonderland exploring various fantasy locations through the power of painting and creativity. Players help Alice navigate through whimsical environments inspired by the classic story.

Based on the 1992 film, the story follows Ellen Ripley who crash-lands on the prison planet Fiorina 161 with a deadly Xenomorph. Ripley must work with the convicts and guards to eliminate the alien threat while trapped on the isolated penal colony.

Based on the 1992 film, the game follows Ellen Ripley who crash-lands on the prison planet Fiorina 161. She must survive and eliminate deadly Xenomorphs that have infested the facility while protecting the remaining inmates and herself.

Set on the prison planet Fiorina 161, Ellen Ripley crash-lands and discovers that an alien xenomorph has been unleashed among the inmates. The isolated facility becomes a hunting ground as Ripley and the prisoners must survive against the deadly creature while trapped with no escape.

Based on the 1992 film, the game follows Ellen Ripley who is stranded on Fiorina 161, a prison planet infested with deadly Xenomorphs. Ripley must rescue prisoners and eliminate the alien threat while dealing with the knowledge that she carries an alien queen embryo inside her.

An alien's UFO crashes on Earth and is immediately confiscated by government agents. The small yellow alien must fight through hordes of FBI agents and military forces to recover his spacecraft and escape the planet.

Set 200 years after Alien 3, scientists have successfully cloned Ellen Ripley along with the Xenomorph Queen inside her. When the Xenomorphs break free aboard the research vessel Auriga, Ripley must escape while dealing with her conflicted nature as part-human, part-alien.

Epsilon-Eagle, a former villain turned hero, must stop the Scarlet terrorist organization from conquering the planet. After being betrayed and left for dead, he seeks revenge against his former comrades while protecting innocent lives.

Earth is under attack by an alien invasion force that has begun transforming humans into grotesque monsters. A team of special agents must fight through the infested city to reach the alien mothership and stop the invasion.

Space colonies have been overrun by hostile alien creatures that have captured human hostages. Two brave soldiers must infiltrate the alien-infested facilities to rescue the hostages and eliminate the alien threat.

The game spans the storylines of the first three Alien films, following Ellen Ripley's encounters with the Xenomorph species. From the original Nostromo incident through the colony of LV-426 and finally to the prison planet Fiorina 161, Ripley faces increasingly dangerous alien threats.

Spanning the events of the first three Alien films, players experience Ellen Ripley's encounters with the xenomorph species across different locations. From the original Nostromo incident to the prison planet Fiorina 161, the trilogy chronicles humanity's ongoing battle against the deadly alien menace.

items.title: Alien vs Predator: The Last of His Clan

synopsis.canonical: A young Predator must prove himself as a hunter by facing the ultimate prey: the deadly Xenomorphs. Following Predator tradition, he must hunt these perfect organisms across various alien worlds to earn his place among the elite hunters.

Set in the classic Alien vs. Predator universe where two iconic alien species engage in deadly combat. The story follows the eternal hunt between the technologically advanced Predator warriors and the parasitic Xenomorph aliens. Humans often become caught in the crossfire of this ancient conflict.

Based on the animated TV series sequel to the film Evolution, the story follows a team of scientists and military personnel fighting against evolving alien creatures. The aliens continue to evolve and adapt, creating new threats that require constant vigilance and tactical responses.

Set in the Alien movie universe, the game follows a squad of Colonial Marines investigating a mysterious signal from a derelict ship. The story unfolds as a direct sequel to the film Aliens, with the marines encountering deadly Xenomorph creatures. Each marine has a unique personality and when one dies, they are permanently lost and replaced by a different character.

Based on the 2009 movie, the game follows a group of kids who discover that aliens have invaded their vacation home and are planning to take over Earth. The children must work together to stop the alien invasion while keeping the adults unaware of the situation.

Based on the Alien film franchise, the game is set aboard a space station where deadly Xenomorphs have been unleashed. Players must survive the alien infestation while uncovering the truth behind the outbreak. The story maintains the claustrophobic horror atmosphere of the original films.

Set in a fantasy world where the young sorceress Alisia must prevent the resurrection of the evil sorcerer Baldour. Alisia possesses powerful lightning magic inherited from her father who previously defeated Baldour. She is accompanied by magical creatures that aid her in her quest to save the world from darkness.

Based on the Nickelodeon animated series, the game follows the teenage versions of the Rugrats characters as they navigate high school life and social situations. The story focuses on friendship, self-expression, and typical teenage challenges.

The game brings together Kamen Riders from across the franchise's history in an original story where different Rider worlds collide. Evil forces threaten to destroy all Rider dimensions, requiring heroes from different eras to unite and fight together.

Set in the multiverse of Kamen Rider, where masked heroes from different timelines and realities come together to face threats. The game features storylines crossing multiple Kamen Rider series continuities. Heroes must work together despite coming from different worlds and time periods.

The game presents a straightforward tennis tournament world where professional players compete in various venues around the globe. Players progress through ranks to become the ultimate tennis champion in realistic court settings.

The game features a tennis tournament circuit where players compete to become the world's top-ranked tennis player. The story revolves around climbing the professional tennis ladder through various international tournaments and championships.

A standard basketball simulation game set in contemporary times with professional basketball teams and players. The game focuses on realistic basketball gameplay without any specific narrative context beyond the sport itself.

All-Star Baseball '97 is set in the official Major League Baseball universe, featuring real teams, stadiums, and players from the 1997 season. The game aims to simulate authentic baseball gameplay and atmosphere.

A baseball simulation game featuring Major League Baseball teams and players from the 1997 season. The game recreates the authentic MLB experience with real stadiums, teams, and player statistics from that era.

All-Star Baseball 2000 is set in the official Major League Baseball universe, featuring real teams, stadiums, and players from the 1999-2000 seasons. The game includes authentic MLB stadiums and player statistics.

All-Star Baseball 2003 features the official Major League Baseball license with real teams and players from the 2002-2003 seasons. The portable version maintains the authentic MLB experience on handheld format.

Alleyway takes place in a simple abstract universe where the player controls a paddle at the bottom of the screen. The game has minimal narrative context, focusing purely on the block-breaking action.

Allied General is set during World War II, covering major campaigns from the Allied perspective across multiple theaters of war. Players command Allied forces through historically-based scenarios and battles from 1939 to 1945.

items.title: Alnam no Kiba: Jūzoku Jūnishinto Densetsu

synopsis.canonical: The story takes place in a fantasy world where twelve sacred swords hold mystical power. A young warrior must collect these legendary blades to prevent an ancient evil from awakening and destroying the world.

Alone in the Dark takes place in 1924 at the haunted Derceto mansion in Louisiana, where supernatural horrors lurk within its walls. The player investigates the mysterious death of Jeremy Hartwood while uncovering dark secrets about the mansion's cursed history. Ancient evils and Lovecraftian monsters threaten anyone who dares to enter.

Alone in the Dark 2 is set in the 1920s prohibition era, where Edward Carnby investigates the kidnapping of young Grace Saunders by the ghost pirate One-Eyed Jack and his undead crew. The action takes place at Hell's Kitchen, a mansion inhabited by 1920s gangster spirits and supernatural beings. Carnby must rescue Grace while battling bootlegger ghosts and solving the mystery of the cursed location.

Set in the 1920s, the story follows detective Edward Carnby as he investigates the kidnapping of young Grace Saunders by the gangster One Eyed Jack and his crew. The adventure takes place in Hell's Kitchen, a mansion turned pirate stronghold where supernatural forces and criminal elements collide.

items.title: Alone in the Dark: The New Nightmare

synopsis.canonical: The New Nightmare follows Edward Carnby and Aline Cedrac as they investigate supernatural occurrences on Shadow Island off the Massachusetts coast. They discover an ancient war between the light-bringing Abkanis and the darkness-spreading creatures of the World of Darkness. The island serves as a battleground where this cosmic conflict threatens to spill into our reality.

items.title: Alone in the Dark: The New Nightmare

synopsis.canonical: Edward Carnby and Aline Cedrac travel to Shadow Island to investigate the death of Carnby's friend Charles Fiske, who was searching for three ancient tablets. The island is overrun by creatures of darkness called Creatures of Darkness that are vulnerable only to light, and an ancient evil known as the Dark World threatens to consume reality.
The year is 2525 and Earth is under attack by an alien armada. The player pilots the SYD fighter spacecraft as humanity's last hope against the invading forces.
A skiing simulation set in various mountain resorts around the world. Players compete in downhill skiing events across different courses and weather conditions.

Zeus resurrects a Roman centurion to rescue his daughter Athena from the underworld ruler Neff. The hero must traverse through various hellish realms, transforming into powerful beasts to defeat demonic enemies.

In ancient Greece, the god Zeus resurrects a fallen centurion to rescue his daughter Athena from the underworld demon Neff. The hero must battle through various mythological realms, transforming into powerful were-beasts to gain the strength needed to face supernatural enemies.

items.title: Altered Beast: Guardian of the Realms

synopsis.canonical: Set in a world where darkness threatens to consume all realms, players control shapeshifting warriors. The guardians must restore balance by defeating evil forces across multiple dimensions.
Players control a lone astronaut trapped aboard a malfunctioning space station overrun by hostile alien creatures. The goal is to escape the station while uncovering what happened to the crew.

Alundra is a young dreamwalker with the power to enter people's dreams and nightmares. He arrives in the village of Inoa, which is plagued by a curse causing villagers to die in their sleep from terrible nightmares.

Set in a steampunk world, the story follows Flint as he investigates mysterious incidents involving magical keys. The world is threatened by an ancient evil that seeks to use these keys for destructive purposes.
Marine Amagon is stranded on a mysterious island after his plane crashes. The island is inhabited by strange mutated creatures and dangerous monsters that he must fight to survive.

Set in the whimsical Hebereke universe, the game features the penguin-like Hebe and friends in a lighthearted adventure. The characters embark on a journey filled with colorful environments and quirky situations.
A penguin hero must save his Antarctic homeland from various threats. The game features a penguin protagonist navigating through ice-based environments filled with enemies and obstacles.
The game features a heroic potato character who must navigate through various challenging environments. King Bowser has stolen other vegetables, and Amazing Tater must rescue them.

Set in the contemporary United States political system during presidential election campaigns. Players navigate the complex world of American politics and electoral processes. The game simulates the democratic process of running for the highest office in the land.

Players take on the role of competitive bass fishermen participating in tournaments across various American lakes and waterways. The game focuses on realistic fishing simulation with accurate fish behavior and environmental conditions.

Based on the popular TV show, contestants compete in an arena-based competition against superhuman gladiators. The setting is a futuristic sports entertainment complex where challengers must prove their worth through various physical and combat challenges.

Based on the television game show, contestants compete in various athletic challenges against the show's superhuman gladiators. The game recreates the arena atmosphere where everyday people test their physical prowess against professional athletes in combat-style events.

Based on the television show where contestants compete against the powerful Gladiators in various physical challenges. Set in a futuristic arena where strength, speed, and determination are put to the ultimate test. The game captures the spectacle and competition of the iconic TV series.

Based on the television singing competition, players navigate the world of pop stardom by auditioning and competing to become the next American Idol. The game follows the format of the TV show with judges, audience voting, and elimination rounds.

Set in a mysterious South American region, the story follows a journalist investigating the disappearance of an ornithologist who was studying rare white birds. The narrative unfolds through exploration of exotic locations and uncovering the secrets of an ancient civilization connected to these mystical creatures.
The game is based on the traditional Japanese lottery game called Amida-kuji. Players navigate through a maze-like structure following connected lines to determine outcomes.

Set in a dystopian future where corporations control society through gladiatorial mech combat, pilots fight in massive robotic suits for entertainment and profit. The world has devolved into a violent spectacle where mechs battle in arenas for the amusement of the masses.

items.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West

synopsis.canonical: Following the adventures of Fievel Mousekewitz, a young mouse who has moved with his family to the American frontier. The story takes place in the Wild West where Fievel must face new dangers and adventures while trying to reunite with his family and become a hero.

items.title: An American Tail: Fievel's Gold Rush

synopsis.canonical: Fievel Mousekewitz finds himself in the middle of the California Gold Rush, searching for fortune while facing the dangers of the mining frontier. The story follows Fievel as he navigates the challenges of gold prospecting while dealing with both natural hazards and villainous characters trying to steal his discoveries.

Based on the animated film, the story follows a young woman with amnesia who may be the lost Russian princess Anastasia Romanov. Set in early 20th century Russia and Paris, Anastasia must discover her true identity while being pursued by the evil sorcerer Rasputin who seeks to destroy the Romanov bloodline.

A tennis simulation featuring the professional tennis circuit, where players compete in tournaments around the world. The game focuses on realistic tennis gameplay and the career of professional tennis player Andre Agassi.

A tennis simulation featuring real professional players competing in various tournament settings. The game recreates the atmosphere of professional tennis with authentic players and court environments.

A racing simulation set in the world of professional motorsports, featuring officially licensed Indy Car racing. Players compete in authentic racing circuits and championships based on real-world IndyCar racing series.

A racing simulation featuring the Andretti family legacy in motorsports, focusing on IndyCar and Formula racing circuits. Players experience the high-speed world of professional open-wheel racing with authentic tracks and racing dynamics.
Set in a fantasy world where the protagonist must rescue a kidnapped princess from evil forces. The story follows traditional RPG themes of heroism and adventure across various mystical locations.

items.title: Angel Devoid: Face of the Enemy

synopsis.canonical: Set in a dystopian future where humanity faces an alien invasion, the story follows investigations into mysterious disappearances and alien infiltration. The game combines science fiction horror elements with detective work as players uncover the truth behind the extraterrestrial threat.

items.title: Angel Devoid: Face of the Enemy

synopsis.canonical: Set in a dark future where humanity faces an alien threat that has infiltrated society. The story follows investigation into mysterious disappearances and encounters with otherworldly entities. Players uncover a conspiracy involving alien possession and the fight for human survival.

Set in a fantasy realm where the player takes on the role of a young woman chosen as a Queen Candidate who must cultivate a barren continent. The story revolves around managing the land while building relationships with nine male Guardians who control different elements and aspects of the world.

Set in a fantasy universe where the protagonist is chosen as a Queen Candidate who must cultivate a barren continent using the power of the Sacrea. The story revolves around managing the land while building relationships with nine male Guardians who each control different elemental powers.

A continuation of the Angelique series set in the same fantasy universe where Queen Candidates must cultivate continents with the help of Guardians. This installment features enhanced storylines and additional romantic scenarios with the Guardian characters.

Set in a fantasy universe where the player takes on the role of a Queen candidate who must cultivate a barren continent using the power of nine male Guardians. The story revolves around managing relationships with these Guardians while fulfilling the divine duty of bringing life to the land. This expanded version includes additional storylines and character development beyond the original Angelique.

Part of the Angelique otome game series, this entry continues the fantasy setting where Queen candidates must cultivate lands with the help of male Guardians. The subtitle suggests themes of heavenly or celestial elements within the established universe. The story likely involves new challenges and relationships for the protagonist in her role as a potential Queen.

Based on the web series, the Nerd is transported into the very video games he reviews and must survive their intentionally frustrating design. Set in a meta-universe where bad game design becomes literal obstacles and enemies. The story parodies classic gaming tropes while celebrating retro gaming culture.

summary.legacy: Animal Crossing: Wild World est un jeu Action sorti en 2005 sur Nintendo DS, développé par Nintendo. Metascore : 87 — Rareté : COMMON.
summary.canonical: Animal Crossing: Wild World est un jeu Action sorti en 2005 sur Nintendo DS, développé par Nintendo. Metascore : 87 — Rareté : COMMON.

synopsis.canonical: Set in a peaceful village inhabited by anthropomorphic animals, players take on the role of a human resident who moves to a new town. The game focuses on daily life simulation where players interact with animal neighbors, participate in community events, and customize their living space in a never-ending virtual world.

The game centers around wildlife rescue and conservation efforts, where players work to save various animal species. The narrative focuses on environmental protection themes and the importance of preserving endangered animals. Players take on the role of a wildlife rescuer working to help animals in distress.

Based on the Warner Bros. animated series, the game follows the zany adventures of Yakko, Wakko, and Dot Warner as they escape from the Warner Bros. studio lot. The three cartoon siblings must navigate through various movie sets and studio locations while avoiding capture and causing their trademark mayhem.

Based on the Warner Bros animated series, the game follows the zany Warner siblings Yakko, Wakko, and Dot as they escape from the Warner Bros water tower and cause mayhem around the studio lot. The trio must collect movie scripts and props while avoiding studio security and various cartoon villains. Their goal is to help produce movies while staying one step ahead of those trying to capture them.

Based on the Warner Bros. animated series, the game features the zany Warner siblings Yakko, Wakko, and Dot as they cause mayhem around the Warner Bros. movie studio. The story involves the trio escaping from the studio water tower and exploring various movie sets and studio locations. The narrative captures the chaotic and comedic spirit of the original animated series.

Based on the book series, the game follows a group of teenagers who gain the power to transform into animals to fight against the secret invasion of parasitic aliens called Yeerks. The Yeerks are infiltrating human society by taking control of human hosts, and only the Animorphs stand between them and total planetary domination. The teenagers must use their morphing abilities to gather intelligence and strike back against the alien threat.

Set in the Animorphs universe, reality itself begins to fracture and the normal rules of morphing become unstable. The Animorphs find themselves dealing with temporal anomalies and alternate realities where the war against the Yeerks has taken different paths. They must navigate these shattered realities to restore the timeline and prevent total chaos from consuming all possible worlds.

A tennis simulation featuring professional tennis player Anna Kournikova and various fictional opponents competing in international tennis tournaments. The game takes place across multiple real-world tennis venues as players work their way up the professional tennis circuit. The narrative focuses on achieving tennis greatness through tournament victories and improving world rankings.
A strategy RPG set in a biblical fantasy world featuring angels, demons, and divine conflicts. Players navigate through religious-themed scenarios and mythological battles.

Set in a psychological thriller universe where reality and perception are constantly questioned. The story follows characters dealing with mysterious mental phenomena and supernatural occurrences that blur the line between what is real and imagined. Square's narrative explores themes of consciousness, identity, and psychological horror.

Young physicist Lester Knight Chaykin is conducting a particle acceleration experiment when a lightning strike causes him to be transported to an alien world. Stranded on this hostile planet filled with dangerous creatures and an oppressive alien civilization, Lester must survive and find a way home. He forms an unlikely alliance with an alien prisoner who becomes his companion in their struggle for freedom.

The story follows young physicist Lester Knight Chaykin who is accidentally transported to an alien world during a particle accelerator experiment. Stranded on this hostile planet filled with dangerous creatures and an alien civilization, Lester must survive and find a way to return home. The narrative is told primarily through visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

The game follows Penta the penguin as he embarks on a journey across Antarctica to reach various research stations scattered across the icy continent. Racing against time, Penta must navigate treacherous ice floes, avoid seals and other Antarctic wildlife, and collect fish along the way. The adventure takes place in a whimsical version of Antarctica where a determined penguin can traverse vast distances on foot.

Set in a whimsical board game world, players compete in a magical game show where they must solve picture puzzles to advance around a board. The game takes place in a colorful, abstract realm where quick thinking and puzzle-solving skills determine the winner. Various themed categories provide different types of visual challenges for contestants to overcome.

Based on the DreamWorks animated film, the game follows Z, a neurotic worker ant who dreams of breaking free from the rigid caste system of his colony. When Z accidentally becomes a war hero and wins the heart of Princess Bala, he must navigate the complex politics of ant society. The story involves Z's journey from conformist worker to individualistic hero as he challenges the authoritarian General Mandible's plans for the colony.

Based on the DreamWorks animated film Antz, the game takes place in the insect colony where ant characters engage in racing competitions. The story involves the ant colony's characters participating in various racing events across miniature environments. The narrative maintains the film's themes of individuality and teamwork within the structured ant society.

Based on the DreamWorks Antz movie, the game is set within the ant colony universe where insect characters compete in racing events. The story takes place in the miniature world of ants where racing serves as entertainment and competition among colony members. The game captures the film's setting of structured insect society with individual personalities.

The game follows a scientific expedition to Antarctica aboard the research submarine Ao No 6-Gou (Blue Number 6). The crew discovers mysterious phenomena and ancient secrets buried beneath the Antarctic ice. The story unfolds as a survival adventure mixing science fiction elements with exploration themes.

Based on the soccer manga and anime series, the story follows the journey of young soccer players pursuing their dreams of becoming professional athletes. The narrative centers on Toshihiko Tanaka and his teammates as they face various challenges both on and off the soccer field. The story emphasizes themes of friendship, determination, and the pursuit of excellence in competitive sports.

The game takes place in a world where a monkey named Specter gains super intelligence from an experimental helmet and leads an army of apes in a plan to rewrite history. The protagonist Spike must travel through various time periods to capture the escaped apes using futuristic gadgets. The fate of human civilization hangs in the balance as the apes attempt to alter key historical events.

Set in a post-apocalyptic future where humanity faces extinction from demonic forces and alien invaders. The player takes on the role of Trey Kincaid, a warrior fighting through hellish landscapes to save what remains of civilization. The game features a dark science fiction setting where technology and supernatural elements collide.

Based on Masamune Shirow's cyberpunk manga, the game is set in the post-apocalyptic utopian city of Olympus where humans and bioroids (artificial humans) coexist. The story follows the elite ESWAT team as they maintain peace and order in this technologically advanced society. The narrative explores themes of humanity, artificial intelligence, and the balance between order and freedom in a controlled society.

The game is set in a futuristic world where high-speed watercraft racing has become the ultimate sport. Competitors pilot advanced jet boats through challenging aquatic courses in various exotic locations. The racing circuit represents the pinnacle of water-based motorsport technology.

The game takes place in an underwater world where players manage and care for various sea creatures in their aquatic habitat. The ocean environment serves as both home and ecosystem that must be maintained for the creatures to thrive. The story focuses on the relationship between caretaker and marine life in a peaceful aquatic setting.

The game takes place in a peaceful underwater world where the player explores the depths of the ocean as a marine researcher. Set in a serene aquatic environment, the focus is on discovery and observation rather than conflict. The underwater realm is filled with diverse marine life and hidden secrets waiting to be uncovered.

Based on the classic tales of Arabian Nights, the game follows a young prince on a quest through magical Middle Eastern lands. The prince must overcome various obstacles and enemies while searching for treasure and adventure. The world is filled with genies, magic carpets, and other elements from classic Arabian folklore.

The game is set in a fantasy world where the balance between light and darkness is maintained by ancient artifacts called Arcs. When this balance is threatened by the resurrection of an ancient evil, young heroes must embark on a quest to restore harmony. The world faces destruction as dark forces seek to plunge everything into eternal darkness.

Set ten years after the first game, the world has been transformed into a post-apocalyptic wasteland following the events of the previous adventure. The story follows Elc, a young hunter searching for his missing sister in this devastated world. Ancient machines and monsters roam the land as survivors struggle to rebuild civilization.

The story takes place several years after Arc the Lad II, focusing on Alec, a young member of the Hunter's Guild who becomes involved in a new threat to the world. Ancient evils once again stir as political tensions rise between different factions seeking control over the recovering world. The fate of the rebuilt civilization hangs in the balance as new heroes must rise to face the darkness.
Classic arcade games ported to portable format without an overarching narrative universe. The compilation features timeless arcade experiences adapted for handheld play with enhanced color graphics.
A collection of classic arcade games ported to handheld format. The package contains traditional arcade experiences without overarching narrative connections.

The world of Elemen is threatened by an ancient evil that has begun to corrupt the land and its inhabitants. A young warrior must journey through various realms to collect magical cards and restore balance to the world. The story follows a classic fantasy narrative of good versus evil with mystical elements.

A street basketball tournament where anything goes and there are virtually no rules. Players compete in rough-and-tumble matches where fighting and aggressive play are not only allowed but encouraged. The setting is urban basketball courts where winning by any means necessary is the only goal.
A basketball universe where street-style gameplay dominates and aggressive play is not only allowed but encouraged. The game takes place in various urban basketball courts where anything goes to win.

A realistic pool hall simulation with no overarching narrative or story elements. The game focuses purely on recreating the experience of playing various cue sports in different venues. Players compete in tournaments and matches across different pool game variations.
A realistic pool hall simulation without narrative elements, focusing purely on authentic billiards gameplay. The game recreates the atmosphere and physics of professional pool playing.

Based on the National Geographic documentary, the game follows the lives of polar bears and walruses in the Arctic wilderness. Players experience the harsh realities of survival in the changing Arctic environment. The narrative focuses on the natural lifecycle and challenges faced by Arctic wildlife.

The world is threatened by an evil sorcerer who has unleashed monsters and chaos across the land. Four heroes with different abilities must journey together to defeat this ancient evil and restore peace. The story takes place in a fantasy realm filled with dungeons, monsters, and magical artifacts.
The kingdom of Arcus faces invasion by the evil Levalius and his monster army. Four heroes must journey across dangerous lands to collect magical cards and restore peace to their realm.

Ardy Lightfoot and his companion Pec must search for seven magical rainbow crystals to prevent the world from falling into eternal darkness. The evil Visconti has scattered these crystals across various worlds and dimensions. Their quest takes them through diverse environments as they work to restore light to their world.

Alien forces have taken control of the top-secret Area 51 military facility and are conducting experiments on captured humans. Special agents must infiltrate the base to eliminate the alien threat and rescue survivors. The story involves government conspiracy, alien invasion, and military cover-ups at the infamous Nevada testing site.

Players take on the role of special agents investigating the mysterious Area 51 military facility overrun by aliens. The classified base has become ground zero for an extraterrestrial invasion that must be contained.

The kingdom has fallen under a dark curse and the princess Aretha must embark on a quest to break the evil spell. Ancient magic and mystical forces threaten the land while monsters roam freely across the realm. Aretha must gather allies and magical power to restore peace and lift the darkness from her kingdom.

items.title: Aretha II: Ariel no Fushigi na Tabi

synopsis.canonical: Ariel embarks on a mysterious journey through a magical world filled with strange creatures and mystical locations. The story follows her adventures as she encounters various challenges and puzzles in this fantastical realm. Ancient magic and supernatural forces guide her path through this wonderful and dangerous journey.

items.title: Aretha II: Ariel no Fushigi na Tabi

synopsis.canonical: Set in a fantasy world where the protagonist Ariel embarks on a mystical journey. The story follows traditional JRPG themes of adventure and magical discovery in an expansive fantasy realm.

In the distant future, Earth is under attack by an alien invasion force that has overwhelmed the planet's defenses. The player pilots the advanced Argus fighter spacecraft as humanity's last hope against the extraterrestrial threat. The fate of Earth depends on eliminating the alien motherships and their countless drone fighters.

Based on Disney's animated film, the game follows Ariel, a curious mermaid princess who dreams of living in the human world above the sea. The story encompasses her underwater adventures and her quest to become human with help from the sea witch Ursula.

Set in a science fiction universe where time travel technology has been discovered, players must navigate through different time periods to prevent a catastrophic temporal disaster. The story involves mysterious organizations and the consequences of manipulating time itself.

The spacecraft Vaus must break through the barrier of mystery created by the dimension-controlling fortress Doh. Players pilot the Vaus craft in a battle against the evil entity that has trapped Earth's space fleet.

The spaceship Vaus must destroy the DOH entity and its fortress using a special energy ball. The ship has been trapped in dimensional space and must break through multiple barrier walls to escape and complete its mission.

A continuation of the Arkanoid saga where new threats emerge in the dimension-controlling universe. The Vaus spacecraft returns to face evolved enemies and more complex barrier systems created by mysterious forces.

The evil Doh has returned with greater power, creating more complex dimensional barriers to trap the space fleet. The Vaus spacecraft must once again challenge the fortress of mystery and break through the enhanced barrier systems.

Following the defeat of the original Doh, its essence has regenerated with a desire for revenge against the Vaus spacecraft. The evil entity creates even more devious dimensional barriers and summons new challenges to destroy its nemesis.

The evil wizard Shogun has stolen the magical Arkista's Ring and used its power to transform the peaceful land into a monster-infested realm. An elf warrior must venture through the corrupted world to recover the ring and restore peace to the land.

A simple action game featuring an armadillo character navigating through various natural environments. The story involves the armadillo's journey through different terrains while avoiding predators and obstacles.

Set in a post-apocalyptic future where corporations control society through massive mechanized weapons called Armored Cores. Independent mercenaries known as Ravens pilot these mechs and take on missions for various corporate clients in a world recovering from a great destruction.

Taking place after the events of the original Armored Core series, the game focuses on arena combat where Ravens compete in sanctioned battles for glory and profit. The story involves a mysterious organization manipulating the arena tournaments for their own agenda.

A mysterious underground facility called Phantasma has been discovered, containing advanced technology that could shift the balance of corporate power. Ravens are sent to investigate the facility and uncover its secrets while dealing with both automated defenses and rival mercenaries.

Set in a futuristic world where armored police officers pilot mechanical suits to fight crime and maintain order. The story follows the Metal Jack police force as they battle various threats using advanced technology.

The game is based on an anime series set in a futuristic world where heavily armored police units known as Metal Jacks protect society from various threats. The story follows the adventures of these mechanized law enforcement officers as they battle criminals and maintain order in a high-tech urban environment.

Based on the Valiant Comics series, the game is set in a future where an alien insect race called the S.W.A.R.M. has invaded Earth. The Armorines are an elite military unit equipped with advanced powered armor designed specifically to combat the insectoid threat and save humanity.

Earth is under attack by an alien insect species known as the Breed, who have invaded through dimensional rifts. The Armorines, an elite military unit equipped with advanced power armor, are humanity's last hope against this extraterrestrial threat. The fate of the planet depends on stopping the Breed invasion and closing the dimensional portals.

Earth faces invasion by an alien insect race known as the Breed in the year 2006. The military deploys the Armorines, elite soldiers equipped with advanced powered armor suits, to eliminate the extraterrestrial threat.

The green and tan plastic army men wage eternal warfare in a child's bedroom and backyard setting. Sarge leads the Green Army against the oppressive Tan Army in various household battlefields. The conflict takes place in a world where toy soldiers have come to life to fight their plastic war.

The Green Army continues its fight against the Tan Army across various miniature battlefields in household settings. Sarge and his team must complete dangerous missions to protect their plastic homeland from Tan invasion. The war rages on through gardens, bedrooms, and other domestic locations where toy soldiers battle for supremacy.

items.title: Army Men World War: Team Assault

synopsis.canonical: The plastic Green and Tan armies engage in large-scale warfare reminiscent of World War II battles. Teams of army men fight across various household and outdoor environments in epic conflicts. The war has escalated to include major assault operations with multiple soldiers working together in coordinated attacks.

The Green Army battles against the Tan Army in a miniature world of plastic toy soldiers. Colonel Grimm leads aerial missions to support ground forces and defeat the enemy tan plastic soldiers in various household and backyard environments.

Set in the Army Men universe where plastic toy soldiers come to life in a backyard battlefield. The Green Army fights against the Tan Army in various household environments like kitchens, bathrooms, and gardens.

Set in the Army Men universe where plastic toy soldiers come to life in household environments. The Green Army faces off against the Tan Army in aerial combat scenarios across various domestic battlefields.

Continuing the plastic warfare in the Army Men universe, the Green Army faces new threats from the Tan Army. The conflict expands beyond the backyard into new domestic battlefields with escalating aerial warfare.
Set in the Army Men universe where a Green Army soldier goes rogue and must fight against both Green and Tan forces. The story involves betrayal and survival in the plastic toy soldier battlefield.

Part of the Army Men universe featuring the ongoing war between Green and Tan plastic armies. The conflict involves tactical combat across various household environments with military-style operations.
Set in the classic Army Men universe where plastic Green Army soldiers battle against the Tan Army. The conflict takes place in typical household settings transformed into military battlefields.

In the Army Men universe, Sergeant Hawk and his Green Army squad fight against the evil General Plastro and his Tan Army. The battle takes place across various rooms of a house, with plastic soldiers coming to life in epic warfare.

The Green Army battles against the Tan Army in a world of living plastic soldiers set in household environments. Sarge must rescue his captured teammates and defeat the evil Tan Army forces led by General Plastro.

General Plastro has been defeated but Colonel Grimm seeks revenge against Sarge and the Green Army. The conflict continues across new battlefields as Grimm attempts to resurrect Plastro and destroy the Green Army once and for all.

The sequel continues the battle between Green and Tan plastic armies in household settings. Sarge faces new challenges as the Tan Army develops more advanced weapons and strategies in their ongoing war.

The game takes place in the plastic toy soldier universe where green and tan army men are locked in an eternal war for dominance in various household and backyard battlefields. Sarge and his squad must battle against the tan army while navigating through environments that are massive from a toy soldier's perspective. The conflict extends beyond the typical toy box as the soldiers find themselves in real-world locations fighting for survival.
Set in the Army Men universe where plastic soldiers battle for control of territory in backyard warfare. The Green Army faces off against multiple colored armies in strategic combat for dominance.
A golf simulation featuring professional golfer Arnold Palmer and tournament play. The game focuses on realistic golf mechanics and competitive tournament gameplay.

Based on Jules Verne's classic adventure novel, the story follows Phileas Fogg's ambitious journey to circumnavigate the globe in exactly 80 days. Fogg must overcome various obstacles and challenges across different countries and cultures to win his famous wager.

Set in a futuristic world where Earth faces invasion from alien forces threatening humanity's survival. A lone pilot must take control of an advanced transforming mecha to defend the planet against overwhelming odds.
A creative software package that allows users to create digital artwork without a specific narrative universe. The program focuses on artistic expression rather than storytelling elements.

Set in the fictional city of Southtown in 1978, the story follows Ryo Sakazaki as he searches for his kidnapped sister Yuri. The game takes place in a world where martial artists possess special fighting techniques and supernatural abilities. Ryo must fight through the criminal underworld to rescue his sister from the crime boss Mr. Big.

summary.legacy: Art of Fighting 2 est un jeu Action sorti en 1994 sur Neo Geo, développé par SNK. Metascore : 78 — Rareté : UNCOMMON.
summary.canonical: Art of Fighting 2 est un jeu Action sorti en 1994 sur Neo Geo, développé par SNK. Metascore : 78 — Rareté : UNCOMMON.

synopsis.canonical: Taking place one year after the original game, the story focuses on Geese Howard's rise to power in Southtown. The King of Fighters tournament is announced, drawing fighters from around the world to compete. The Sakazaki family becomes involved when they discover connections between the tournament and their father Takuma's mysterious past.

Set in the same universe as the original Art of Fighting, the story continues the saga of fighters seeking to prove their martial arts supremacy. The tournament brings together warriors from around the world in intense combat competitions.

Based on the film, the story follows young Arthur who discovers a hidden world of tiny people called Minimoys in his grandmother's garden. Arthur must shrink down to their size to save both their world and his grandmother's house from destruction.

items.title: Arthur to Astaroth no Nazomakaimura: Incredible Toons

synopsis.canonical: Set in the Ghosts 'n Goblins universe, this puzzle game features the demon realm where Arthur must navigate through supernatural challenges. The game combines the gothic horror atmosphere of the series with puzzle-solving mechanics involving supernatural creatures and traps.

Based on the Arthur children's book series, the game follows the young aardvark Arthur Read through various activities in his hometown of Elwood City. Players experience a typical day in Arthur's life filled with mini-games and interactions with familiar characters from the PBS animated series.

The game takes place in a mystical world where ancient artifacts hold immense power and must be collected to save the realm. Players embark on a quest to gather these magical items while battling dark forces that threaten the land.

Based on the classic boxing manga and anime series, the game follows Joe Yabuki, a troubled youth who discovers boxing in a detention center. The story chronicles his journey from delinquent to professional boxer, facing various opponents while dealing with personal struggles and relationships in 1960s Japan.

The game features Asmik-kun, the mascot character of Asmik Corporation, in a colorful fantasy world filled with various obstacles and enemies. Asmik-kun must traverse through different themed lands to complete his quest and restore peace to his world.

This sequel continues Asmik-kun's adventures in a new set of worlds and challenges. The cheerful mascot character faces new enemies and obstacles while exploring different themed environments in his ongoing quest to bring peace and happiness to his world.

Set in a futuristic world where combat takes place in large mechanical rigs within arena-based environments. Players participate in gladiatorial-style battles using heavily armed vehicles. The game presents a dystopian future where mechanized combat entertainment dominates society.

Set in a future where humanity has colonized space and engaged in interplanetary warfare using mechanized assault suits. Earth faces invasion from alien forces, and elite pilots must use advanced mecha to defend colonies and strategic locations. The story follows a pilot fighting through various space-based battlefields to repel the alien threat.

Set in a future where humanity fights wars using powerful mechanized assault suits called Leynos. The story follows military conflicts on various planets as pilots engage in large-scale mecha warfare. Earth forces battle against rebel factions and alien threats across the solar system.

Set in a future where humanity has colonized space, the story involves mecha pilots fighting in interplanetary conflicts. The game focuses on military operations using powerful assault suits called Valkens in various combat scenarios across different worlds.

Based on the famous French comic series, the game takes place in ancient Gaul around 50 BC where a small village of indomitable Gauls holds out against Roman occupation. Asterix and his friends use magic potion that gives superhuman strength to fight off Roman legions. The village druid Getafix brews the magic potion that makes the Gauls invincible.

Set in ancient Gaul during Roman occupation, the game follows the adventures of Asterix, a small but mighty Gaulish warrior, and his best friend Obelix. Armed with a magic potion that gives superhuman strength, they defend their village from Roman invaders while embarking on various quests across the ancient world.

Set in ancient Gaul during Roman occupation, the game follows the adventures of the famous Gallic warrior and his village of indomitable Gauls. The story involves their ongoing resistance against Roman forces with the help of a magical strength potion brewed by their druid.

Based on the famous French comic series, the game takes place in ancient Gaul around 50 BC where a small village of indomitable Gauls holds out against Roman occupation. Asterix and Obelix embark on adventures to defend their village and help friends across the Roman Empire. The duo uses magic potion and natural strength to overcome Roman forces and other threats.

The story takes place when all the villagers except Asterix and Obelix have been kidnapped and taken to a theme park called Las Vegum. The two Gaulish heroes must infiltrate this Roman-controlled entertainment complex to rescue their friends and fellow villagers from captivity.

Based on the French comic series, the story follows Asterix and Obelix as they journey to rescue their friend Getafix who has been captured by Romans. The adventure takes them across various locations in the Roman Empire where they must fight legions of soldiers. The Gaulish heroes rely on magic potion and Obelix's natural strength to overcome overwhelming odds.

Based on the French comic series, the story begins when Getafix the druid and Dogmatix the dog are kidnapped by Romans. Asterix and Obelix must embark on a rescue mission across various locations in the Roman world. The heroes must use their wits and strength to overcome Roman traps and soldiers to save their friends.

items.title: Asterix and the Power of the Gods

synopsis.canonical: Set in the world of the French comic series, the story involves Asterix embarking on a quest to gather magical ingredients needed to restore the power of the gods. The adventure takes him through mythological realms and ancient lands filled with supernatural dangers. Roman forces and mythical creatures serve as obstacles in his divine mission.

Based on the French comic series, the story begins when Obelix's beloved dog Dogmatix goes missing during one of their adventures. Asterix and Obelix must search across various locations throughout Gaul and the Roman Empire to find their four-legged friend. The quest leads them through forests, Roman camps, and other dangerous territories filled with enemies and obstacles.

Set in the depths of space, the player controls a lone spacecraft navigating through dangerous asteroid fields. The ship is equipped with weapons and thrust systems to survive in the hostile environment of deep space. No larger narrative context exists beyond the immediate survival scenario.

An enhanced version of the classic space survival scenario where a lone pilot navigates treacherous asteroid fields in deep space. The game expands on the original concept with additional enemy types and more complex space environments. The pilot must survive increasingly dangerous cosmic hazards while clearing asteroid-infested sectors.

Astral Bout takes place in a mystical dimension where warriors from different realms compete in supernatural combat tournaments. Fighters possess unique elemental and magical abilities drawn from their respective worlds. The tournament serves as a proving ground for the strongest combatants across multiple planes of existence.

Set in the world created by Osamu Tezuka, the game follows Astro Boy, a powerful robot created by Dr. Tenma to replace his deceased son. Astro Boy fights to protect humans and robots alike in a future world where the two coexist uneasily. The story involves Astro discovering his past and confronting threats that endanger both artificial and human life.

The game takes place in a futuristic world where advanced mecha suits called Super Machines are used in combat. Players pilot these mechanical warriors in battles against alien invaders threatening Earth.

The game follows a rabbit-like character navigating through various platforming stages in a colorful world. The story involves collecting items and defeating enemies across different themed environments.
Set in a Japanese high school environment where students engage in combat tournaments. The story revolves around various schoolgirls competing in fighting matches as part of school club activities.

items.title: Atelier Marie: The Alchemist of Salburg

synopsis.canonical: Marie is a poor student at the Royal Magic Academy who must prove her worth as an alchemist within five years or face expulsion. She sets up her own workshop in the town of Salburg and begins her journey to become a skilled alchemist. The game focuses on her daily life, crafting magical items, and building relationships with townspeople.

Princess Athena of Victory Land becomes bored with her peaceful kingdom and decides to venture into the dangerous Fantasy World. She must fight through various mythological creatures and demons to prove herself as a warrior. The story follows her quest through increasingly challenging realms filled with monsters and magical beings.

Set in a sports-themed world, the game was designed to work with Nintendo's Family Fun Fitness mat controller. Players participate in various athletic events and challenges to improve their physical fitness while competing in different sporting activities.

The game is set in a virtual athletic competition world where players participate in various Olympic-style sporting events. Athletes compete for glory and recognition in this digital sports arena designed to promote physical fitness through gaming.

The legendary lost continent of Atlantis has been discovered, filled with ancient mysteries and dangerous creatures. An explorer ventures into the underwater ruins to uncover the secrets of this lost civilization. The journey takes the hero through various chambers and passages filled with traps and monsters guarding Atlantis's treasures.

Based on Disney's animated film, the story follows Milo Thatch and his expedition team as they discover the lost underwater city of Atlantis. The adventure involves exploring ancient ruins, meeting the Atlantean people, and uncovering the secrets of their advanced civilization.

Based on Disney's animated film, the game follows the story of Milo Thatch, a linguist and cartographer who joins an expedition to find the lost city of Atlantis. The adventure takes place in 1914 as the team discovers the underwater civilization and becomes involved in the conflicts surrounding the mysterious Heart of Atlantis crystal.

Based on the animated TV series, Betty Barrett is a seemingly normal schoolgirl who secretly works as a Galactic Guardian protecting the universe from evil. She splits her time between regular teenage life on Earth and fighting cosmic villains across the galaxy. The story involves her missions to stop various alien threats while maintaining her secret identity.

The game is set in a world where the player must clear areas filled with enemies and obstacles using bombs. Each stage represents a different location that must be cleared of threats. The story involves progressing through increasingly difficult areas while mastering the art of strategic bomb placement.

In a future world overrun by hostile robots and mechanical creatures, a small combat robot named Atomic Robo-Kid is humanity's last hope. The robotic hero must venture through various industrial and mechanical environments to defeat the robot uprising. The story involves battling through different zones controlled by enemy machines to restore peace.

The game is set in a school where anthropomorphic animals engage in battles and competitions. Students must prove their worth through combat while navigating the politics and rivalries of academy life.

Based on the cult B-movie franchise, the world has been overrun by giant mutant tomatoes that have turned aggressive and begun attacking humanity. Players must fight through waves of these vegetable menaces to save the world from the produce uprising.

Based on the B-movie franchise, the game depicts a world where ordinary tomatoes have become mutated and hostile, attacking humans across various locations. The player takes on the role of a hero trying to stop the vegetable uprising and save humanity from the tomato menace.

A sports simulation set in the world of Australian Rules Football, featuring authentic teams and players from the Australian Football League. The game captures the fast-paced, high-contact nature of this uniquely Australian sport.

items.title: Austin Powers: Welcome to My Underground Lair!

synopsis.canonical: Set in the groovy world of the Austin Powers film franchise, the international man of mystery must infiltrate Dr. Evil's secret underground lair. The game follows the campy spy-comedy tone of the movies with various gadgets and over-the-top scenarios.
A sports simulation featuring authentic Australian Rugby League teams and players from the 1995 season. The game recreates the intense physical competition of professional rugby league in Australia.
A racing simulation featuring authentic Lamborghini supercars racing on various international tracks. The game focuses on the prestige and performance of these Italian luxury sports cars.

Set in the Avatar universe where people can manipulate the four elements, the Fire Nation has waged war against the other nations for 100 years. Aang, the last surviving Air Nomad and the Avatar, must master all four elements to restore balance to the world.

items.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender – The Burning Earth

synopsis.canonical: Continuing the Avatar saga, this game follows the events of Book 2 of the animated series. Aang and his friends face the Fire Nation's continued assault while seeking earthbending training and uncovering secrets in Ba Sing Se.

items.title: Awesome Possum... Kicks Dr. Machino's Butt

synopsis.canonical: Awesome Possum is an environmentally-conscious marsupial superhero who must stop the evil Dr. Machino from polluting the environment. The game features an eco-friendly message as Possum battles robots and industrial machines threatening nature.

In the distant future, the peaceful planet Corliss is under attack by an alien armada known as the Annihilation Force. A lone pilot must take control of the advanced Axelay fighter ship to defend their homeworld and push back the invasion.

The story takes place in a haunted castle filled with supernatural entities and demons called ayakashi. The protagonist must navigate through the cursed fortress to uncover its dark secrets and escape its supernatural threats.

items.title: Ayrton Senna's Super Monaco GP II

synopsis.canonical: Set in the world of Formula One racing, the game features the legendary Brazilian driver Ayrton Senna and recreates the excitement of Grand Prix racing circuits. Players experience the competitive world of F1 racing with authentic teams, drivers, and circuits from the era.

summary.legacy: Azure Dreams est un jeu Action sorti en 1998 sur PlayStation, développé par Konami. Metascore : 78 — Rareté : UNCOMMON.
summary.canonical: Azure Dreams est un jeu Action sorti en 1998 sur PlayStation, développé par Konami. Metascore : 78 — Rareté : UNCOMMON.

synopsis.canonical: Set in the desert town of Monsbaiya, which exists beside a mysterious tower filled with monsters and treasure. The tower resets its layout each time someone enters, and monsters can be tamed and used as companions in battle.

The story takes place in the desert town of Bars, which exists alongside a mysterious monster tower that changes its layout each time someone enters. The protagonist's father was a famous monster tamer who died in the tower, and now the son must explore the tower to uncover its secrets and improve the town.

The game is set in a futuristic military setting where the player pilots an advanced fighter aircraft called the B-Wings. The mission involves defending against enemy forces across various hostile territories and battlefields.

items.title: B.B-Daman Bakugaiden: Victory e no Michi

synopsis.canonical: Set in a fantasy world where heroes use B-Daman marble shooting toys as weapons in epic battles. The story follows various characters competing in tournaments and adventures to become the ultimate B-Daman champion.

B.O.B. (Biologic Operational Being) is a robot teenager who crash-lands on a hostile alien planet after being separated from his ship during a space mission. Stranded and alone, B.O.B. must traverse the dangerous alien world to find his way back to his spacecraft and return home.

Set in a futuristic universe, the game follows a bio-engineered robot named B.O.B. who crash-lands on a hostile alien planet. Stranded and alone, B.O.B. must fight through various alien creatures and environments to find a way off the planet and return home.

Set in a prehistoric world, the game features characters from the Chuck Rock universe participating in stone-age style racing competitions. Cavemen and dinosaurs compete in wild races across various prehistoric environments using primitive but creative vehicles.

Set in the futuristic F-Zero racing universe, this game continues the high-speed anti-gravity racing competitions of the 26th century. Pilots from across the galaxy compete in the most dangerous and prestigious racing tournament using advanced hover vehicles called F-Zero machines.

Set in the futuristic F-Zero racing universe of the 26th century, pilots compete in anti-gravity racing tournaments using advanced hover vehicles. The F-Zero Grand Prix represents the pinnacle of futuristic motorsport competition across various planetary circuits.

Set in the continent of Archanea, this game takes place during the same era as the original Fire Emblem, featuring battles and conflicts within the established Fire Emblem universe. The story involves tactical warfare between kingdoms and the struggle between good and evil forces across the land.

items.title: BS Tantei Club: Yuki ni Kieta Kako

synopsis.canonical: This mystery visual novel is set in modern Japan and involves a detective investigating a complex murder case. The story revolves around uncovering dark secrets and solving puzzles related to a crime that has connections to the past, with supernatural elements woven into the narrative.

items.title: BS The Legend of Zelda: Ancient Stone Tablets

synopsis.canonical: Set in the same Hyrule as A Link to the Past, this game takes place years after Link's original adventure. A new hero is called upon when dark forces threaten Hyrule again, and ancient stone tablets hold the key to restoring peace to the land.

This is a reimagining of the original Legend of Zelda set in Hyrule, where a hero must rescue Princess Zelda and defeat the evil Ganon. The land of Hyrule has been plunged into darkness, and only by collecting the Triforce pieces can peace be restored.

Based on the Babe movie franchise, the game is set on Hoggett Farm where Babe the pig and his animal friends live together. The story follows the adventures of the famous pig and his barnyard companions as they work together to solve problems and help around the farm.

The game takes place in a modern urban setting where the player controls a baby seeking to escape from various household dangers. The baby must navigate through different rooms of a house while avoiding hazards and enemies.

The game features the young version of Felix the Cat during Halloween adventures. Baby Felix must navigate through spooky Halloween-themed environments while collecting treats and avoiding supernatural obstacles.

Back Track is set in a futuristic world where players navigate through various challenging environments. The game features a sci-fi setting with technological obstacles and hazards that must be overcome through precise movement and timing.

Based on the 1985 film, Marty McFly accidentally travels back to 1955 in Doc Brown's time machine. He must ensure his parents fall in love while finding a way to return to 1985 before he ceases to exist.

items.title: Back to the Future Part II & III

synopsis.canonical: Following the events of the first film, Marty and Doc travel to 2015 and then back to the Old West of 1885. They must navigate multiple timelines while dealing with various versions of Biff Tannen threatening their existence.

items.title: Back to the Future Part III

synopsis.canonical: Set in 1885, Doc Brown is trapped in the Old West and Marty must travel back to rescue him. They face the challenges of the Wild West while trying to repair the DeLorean and return to their own time.

Set in the whimsical world of neighborhood kids playing baseball in their local backyard and community fields. The game features both fictional kid characters and younger versions of real MLB players coming together for fun, casual baseball games in a colorful, cartoon-style universe.
